AdventurerBoots.name: Adventurer Boots
AdventurerBoots.flavorText: Hardy leather boots, coated with a waterproof wax, sealing in quality and craftsmanship that will last many seasons.

AdventurerCloak.name: Adventurer Cloak
AdventurerCloak.flavorText: A cloak worn by a veteran adventurer who has experienced all sorts of hardships.

AdventurerTunic.name: Adventurer Tunic
AdventurerTunic.flavorText: An old tunic from those who have gone through a rough adventure.

Ale.name: Ale
Ale.flavorText: A healthy ale made from the finest hops.

Anchor.name: Anchor
Anchor.flavorText: An anchor used to moor a ship. Long submerged beneath the sea, it’s now heavily rusted and worn.

AncientStingrayEgg.name: Ancient Stingray Egg
AncientStingrayEgg.flavorText: An egg with a thick, leathery shell and horn-like spines jutting from its corners. Within, a fragile life still stirs faintly.

AntiquatedCoin.name: Antiquated Coin
AntiquatedCoin.flavorText: An ancient coin bearing the marks of time. Its surface, worn smooth by countless hands, is inscribed with letters of unknown meaning.

AquaglowLantern.name: Aquaglow Lantern
AquaglowLantern.flavorText: This lantern emits a light that never goes out, even underwater. With a shining coral at its center, a reflector focuses the light forward, illuminating the dark waters.

ArcaneEssence.name: Arcane Essence
ArcaneEssence.flavorText: This vivid purple essence is a residue formed when arcane energy fails to disperse into nature. When held close a faint energy can be felt.

ArcaneGarb.name: Arcane Garb
ArcaneGarb.flavorText: Intricate runes etched along the seams, rumored to be tailored from cloth infused with whispers of forgotten incantations.

ArcaneGloves.name: Arcane Gloves
ArcaneGloves.flavorText: These gloves were stitched from thin yet durable sections of flax and leather, featuring a vibrant blue polished stone whose purpose remains a subject of quiet speculation.

ArcaneHood.name: Arcane Hood
ArcaneHood.flavorText: Its material bears a texture both smooth and unyielding, rumored to be spun from frost-touched silk harvested deep within Frost Mountain.

Armet.name: Armet
Armet.flavorText: Molded heavy movable face and cheek plate armor, fully protecting the head from blows.

ArmillarySphere.name: Armillary Sphere
ArmillarySphere.flavorText: A device crafted to observe the movements of the sky. Delicately assembled rings and axes rotate slowly, predicting the passage of time and the motion of constellations.

ArmingSword.name: Arming Sword
ArmingSword.flavorText: A thin blade with leather bindings, supporting a firm grip for hasty attacks that feel light to the hand.

ArmorScrap.name: Armor Scrap
ArmorScrap.flavorText: A fragment of the Living Armor’s tarnished armor, pulsating with the haunting energy of battles fought both in life and beyond the veil of the living.

Arrow.name: Arrow
Arrow.flavorText: An arrow that looks good at penetrating its target.

Awl.name: Awl
Awl.flavorText: A pointed tool used to punch holes in leather or cloth.

AxeOfRighteousness.name: Axe of Righteousness
AxeOfRighteousness.flavorText: Every slash carries the weight of moral certainty, a fearsome foe to any who stand in its way.

BadgerPendant.name: Badger Pendant
BadgerPendant.flavorText: Channel the badger's tenacious spirit with this pendant, designed to amplify your will.

Ball.name: Ball
Ball.flavorText: A heavy iron ball that carries lethal destruction.

Bandage.name: Bandage
Bandage.flavorText: Bandage used to fix a wound.

BansheeSonnet.name: Banshee Sonnet
BansheeSonnet.flavorText: The faint traces of a sorrowful melody are scrawled on this water-damaged parchment, the ink smeared by rain or perhaps endless tears. The paper feels unnaturally cold, as though a tormented soul clings to it, trapped between worlds.

BarbutaHelm.name: Barbuta Helm
BarbutaHelm.flavorText: The helm forged from a single plate of steel, showing off the craftsman skills.

BardicPants.name: Bardic Pants
BardicPants.flavorText: A stylish pair of pants that are sure to attract attention at social gatherings.

Bardiche.name: Bardiche
Bardiche.flavorText: Crafted with a light wooden base that grows wider in order to support an oversized, curved metal blade nailed to it's head.

BarrelHoop.name: Barrel Hoop
BarrelHoop.flavorText: A metal band used to hold a wooden barrel together.

BatClaw.name: Bat Claw
BatClaw.flavorText: A hefty claw with an ebony black surface gleaming with a wicked luster.

BatWing.name: Bat Wing
BatWing.flavorText: A lightweight souvenir snatched from a startled giant bat.

BattleAxe.name: Battle Axe
BattleAxe.flavorText: An axe with a strong wooden hilt and a single blade embedded deeply in the wood.

Bavin.name: Bavin
Bavin.flavorText: A medium length of wood cut from a tree.

BearPendant.name: Bear Pendant
BearPendant.flavorText: Embodying the resilience of the mighty bear, enhancing the wearer's vigor.

BeetleWings.name: Beetle Wings
BeetleWings.flavorText: Delicate wings of a death beetle, emanating an aura of darkness and decay.

Bellows.name: Bellows
Bellows.flavorText: An old set of bellows used to stoke flames in forges or laboratories.

Billet.name: Billet
Billet.flavorText: A small length of wood cut from tree.

Birdcage.name: Birdcage
Birdcage.flavorText: A birdcage made of wood. Though not very durable, it is lightweight and easy to carry.

BlackRose.name: Black Rose
BlackRose.flavorText: The black hue appears unnatural, as though it were forcibly layered over the rose’s original color. Beware of the sharp thorns along its stem.

BlackThreadSpool.name: Black Thread Spool
BlackThreadSpool.flavorText: A bundle of black thread neatly wound around a wooden spool.

BlacksmithTongs.name: Blacksmith Tongs
BlacksmithTongs.flavorText: Tongs used for forging, now stiff with age from long neglect.

BladeOfRighteousness.name: Blade of Righteousness
BladeOfRighteousness.flavorText: A well crafted two-handed blade, its silver edge cuts through most things with ease and grace.

BlazingTail.name: Blazing Tail
BlazingTail.flavorText: A tail severed by a fire lizard in a moment of peril. The heat of its flames still lingers, and it writhes as if it were still alive.

Blemished.name: Blemished Pearl
Blemished.flavorText: A pearl found within giant clams. Its shape is uneven and marked with small blemishes, yet it holds a subtle, distinctive beauty.

BloodsapBlade.name: Bloodsap Blade
BloodsapBlade.flavorText: A dark ritual imbued this sword with the essence of a vampire's curse. This blade not only cuts flesh but siphons the spirit, feeding its master with each drop of blood spilled.

BloodwovenGloves.name: Bloodwoven Gloves
BloodwovenGloves.flavorText: Crafted from durable leather, these gloves were soaked in the blood of beasts to achieve their deep crimson color and lasting flexibility.

BloodwovenRobe.name: Bloodwoven Robe
BloodwovenRobe.flavorText: Rumored to be stitched with threads soaked in the lifeblood of ancient beasts, its crimson tones carry an unsettling warmth.

BlueEyeballs.name: Blue Eyeballs
BlueEyeballs.flavorText: Enigmatic blue eyeballs plucked from the remnants of a Dire Wolf.

BlueSapphire.name: Blue Sapphire (Cracked)
BlueSapphire.flavorText: The shards of this gem shines a deep blue light.

BlueThreadSpool.name: Blue Thread Spool
BlueThreadSpool.flavorText: A bundle of blue thread neatly wound around a wooden spool.

Bolas.name: Bolas
Bolas.flavorText: A throwing weapon made by attaching stones to both ends of a leather cord. Upon impact, the cord wraps around the target, restricting its movement.

Bolt.name: Bolt
Bolt.flavorText: A bolt dedicated to crossbows that is sharp enough to pierce opponents.

BoneHelm.name: Bone Helm
BoneHelm.flavorText: A bone helm favored by warlocks. Its imposing skull visage strikes deep fear into enemies.

BonePowder.name: Bone Powder
BonePowder.flavorText: Bone dust left behind where a Dreadspine's body was destroyed. It has an unusually heavy texture that resists scattering, and gives off a faint sheen when exposed to light.

Boneshaper.name: Boneshaper
Boneshaper.flavorText: Crafted to honor the immense, in battle it brutally reshapes the bones of the wielder’s enemies.

BowOfRighteousness.name: Bow of Righteousness
BowOfRighteousness.flavorText: This bow, adorned with silver inlay, offers an elegant balance of form and function for skilled archers.

Bowstring.name: Bowstring
Bowstring.flavorText: Well-worn fibers that has witnessed countless arrows fly.

BraveHunterPants.name: Brave Hunter's Pants
BraveHunterPants.flavorText: Crafted using both rugged components and mystical textiles, capturing both durability and mystique.

BreathOfTheDeceased.name: Breath of the Deceased
BreathOfTheDeceased.flavorText: This potion disturbs the rest of the dead and awakens a longing for life once more. If poured upon the pentagram hidden somewhere in the crypt, it can summon a lich.

Brimstone.name: Brimstone
Brimstone.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock streaked with pale yellow traces of sulfur.

BrokenBoneSpike.name: Broken Bone Spike
BrokenBoneSpike.flavorText: A broken fragment of a bone spike from a Dreadspine. Its sharpened tip still carries a deadly edge.

BrokenFrame.name: Broken Frame
BrokenFrame.flavorText: A framed painting depicting a rough sea. It appears to have been damaged during a shipwreck.

BrokenGlasses.name: Broken Glasses
BrokenGlasses.flavorText: A pair of glasses with no known owner. One lens is shattered, rendering them unusable.

BrokenJarShard.name: Broken Jar Shard
BrokenJarShard.flavorText: A small shard of pottery from a broken jar.

BrokenPickaxe.name: Broken Pickaxe
BrokenPickaxe.flavorText: The blade is completely worn down, making it unusable.

BrokenSkull.name: Broken Skull
BrokenSkull.flavorText: An imperfect skull with visible fractures.

BrokenTelescopeHead.name: Broken Telescope Head
BrokenTelescopeHead.flavorText: The front end of a broken telescope. The cracked lens and scratched body hint at the years it has endured.

BrokenWarHorn.name: Broken War Horn
BrokenWarHorn.flavorText: This horn is a faithful replica of the one a warlord once used to lead his armies long ago. When blown atop the pentagram inscribed somewhere in the crypt, a deep, resonant sound echoes forth, calling the warlord from beyond.

BrokenWheel.name: Broken Wheel
BrokenWheel.flavorText: A wheel fallen from a broken cart. The spokes are damaged but it could still be repaired and used.

BrokenWoodenBarrelFragment.name: Broken Wooden Barrel Fragment
BrokenWoodenBarrelFragment.flavorText: A shattered fragment of a wooden barrel, completely unusable.

BronzeLadle.name: Bronze Ladle
BronzeLadle.flavorText: A ladle made of bronze. Used for melting metal or scooping out liquids.

BronzeScale.name: Bronze Scale
BronzeScale.flavorText: A set of bronze scales used for measuring the weight of various materials.

Broom.name: Broom
Broom.flavorText: A broom crafted from trimmed, slender branches bound tightly at the base.

BuckledBoots.name: Buckled Boots
BuckledBoots.flavorText: Featuring sturdy leather construction and ornate metal buckles and fastenings for a secure and adjustable fit.

Buckler.name: Buckler
Buckler.flavorText: A small shield with a handle located directly behind the boss, guarding oneself in close-quarter combat.

BugShell.name: Bug Shell
BugShell.flavorText: A preserved sturdy shell from a death beetle.

ButtonedBoots.name: Buttoned Boots
ButtonedBoots.flavorText: Reinforced with heavy stitching, these boots feature a slight heel for balance and a row of decorative buttons along the sides.

ButtonedLeggings.name: Buttoned Leggings
ButtonedLeggings.flavorText: Woven for comfort and practicality, the buttons at the bottom suggest a design meant to allow flexibility or fit adjustments.

Bycocket.name: Bycocket
Bycocket.flavorText: A bycocket made famous by a renowned ranger. Its sharp brim and decorative feather lend it a stylish and refined look.

CampfireKit.name: Campfire Kit
CampfireKit.flavorText: A crackling campfire that you can rest near and recover.

CandyCane.name: Candy Cane
CandyCane.flavorText: The magic of the season is wrapped within every peppermint twist of these candy canes. They're not just a treat for the taste buds but a treasure trove of winter delight and unexpected value.

CandyCorns.name: Candy Corn
CandyCorns.flavorText: Savor the spirit of spookiness with these tri-colored candy corn treats, a sugary staple that adds a dash of fun to every ghostly gathering.

CaptainsCorrodedKey.name: Captain's Corroded Key
CaptainsCorrodedKey.flavorText: A key long submerged beneath the sea, its surface heavily rusted. It may have once belonged to one of the many shipwrecked captains.

CapturedEnergyFlakes.name: Captured Energy Flakes
CapturedEnergyFlakes.flavorText: A small shard of energy left behind as a Demon Imp dissipated. It holds an unstable essence of darkness.

CapturedManaFlakes.name: Captured Mana Flakes
CapturedManaFlakes.flavorText: Luminescent flakes radiating a soft glow and carrying traces of otherworldly magic.

CastillonDagger.name: Castillon Dagger
CastillonDagger.flavorText: Crafted with a fine blade narrowing to a sharp point. The hilts riveted design ensuring a firm grip.

CaveTrollsPreciousRock.name: Cave Trolls Precious Rock
CaveTrollsPreciousRock.flavorText: A smooth, round stone with no notable features beyond its shape and surface. It appears to be a treasured item to a cave troll.

CentaurHoof.name: Centaur Hoof
CentaurHoof.flavorText: This ebony black Centaur hoof, once traversing the fiery depths of forbidden realms, still carries traces of blood in its remaining fur tufts, serving as a dark souvenir from a hellish world.

CentaurMadness.name: Centaur's Madness
CentaurMadness.flavorText: Inlaid with fragments of a centaur’s horn, harnessing pure power.

CeremonialDagger.name: Ceremonial Dagger (Cracked)
CeremonialDagger.flavorText: An ornate dagger with more style than substance.

CeremonialHeaddress.name: Ceremonial Headdress
CeremonialHeaddress.flavorText: Meticulously designed with sorcerers in mind, this piece is crafted from lightweight yet durable fabric and adorned with intricate gold embroidery.

CeremonialStaff.name: Ceremonial Staff
CeremonialStaff.flavorText: Carved from blessed wood, its branches unfurl in a graceful mimicry of nature's own design—antlers reaching towards the heavens.

ChampionArmor.name: Champion Armor
ChampionArmor.flavorText: It is said, good armor on your back is sometimes better and more reliable than the companions you adventure with.

ChapelDeFer.name: Chapel De Fer
ChapelDeFer.flavorText: Crafted with reinforced metals showcasing a broad rimmed style helmet with an open face.

Chaperon.name: Chaperon
Chaperon.flavorText: Made from wool, nice and thick to keep your head warm while adventuring.

Charcoal.name: Charcoal
Charcoal.flavorText: Partially burnt charcoal, with a faint glow still lingering beneath the ash.

CharmofFortune.name: Charm of Fortune
CharmofFortune.flavorText: A charm woven from the feathers of a Cockatrice and an Ice Harpy. It is said to hold the power to keep fortune from escaping, bringing small miracles to those who possess it.

CharredFang.name: Charred Fang
CharredFang.flavorText: It is a blackened fang taken from a Fire Hound. More robust than the teeth of ordinary beasts, it retains its sharpness even under intense heat.

ChocolateChipMuffin.name: Chocolate Chip Muffin
ChocolateChipMuffin.flavorText: A deceptively simple chocolate chip muffin with incredible taste, thanks to Jake's magical ingredient that keeps it fresh forever.

ChroniclesoftheCursedCrown.name: Chronicles of the Cursed Crown
ChroniclesoftheCursedCrown.flavorText: Deep within the Enchanted Dark Forest, a castle shadows a story where an altruistic king's ambition spiraled into darkness. Obsessed with immortality, he sought the mythical Midnight Stag to gain demigod like powers. His tragic transformation into the Ghost King unfolds as a poignant tale of noble intentions leading to ruin, echoing through the cursed halls.

ClarityPotion.name: Potion of Clarity
ClarityPotion.flavorText: It clears the clouded mind and brings back forgotten memories.

CloakofDarkness.name: Cloak of Darkness
CloakofDarkness.flavorText: A cloak crafted using enchanted materials tainted with darkness.

ClothPants.name: Cloth Pants
ClothPants.flavorText: Comfy cloth pants, not offering much as far as protection.

Club.name: Club
Club.flavorText: Simple and effective, this solid wood club is a go-to for those who prefer straightforward, reliable weaponry.

Coal.name: Coal
Coal.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock marked with black traces of coal.

CobaltChapelDeFer.name: Cobalt Chapel De Fer
CobaltChapelDeFer.flavorText: Beautiful craftsmanship, shaping Cobalt steel into a broad rimmed style helmet with an open face.

CobaltFrock.name: Cobalt Frock
CobaltFrock.flavorText: A frock shimmering with a mesmerizing blue glow that adds a Cobalt layer of protection.

CobaltHat.name: Cobalt Hat
CobaltHat.flavorText: A shimmering blue hat that was made from fusing Cobalt into the materials for added strength.

CobaltHeavyGauntlet.name: Cobalt Heavy Gauntlet
CobaltHeavyGauntlet.flavorText: Sturdy and advanced hand armor crafted from Cobalt plated steel.

CobaltHood.name: Cobalt Hood
CobaltHood.flavorText: A hood cut from blue fabric made with Cobalt.

CobaltIngots.name: Cobalt Ingot
CobaltIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure Cobalt.

CobaltLeatherGloves.name: Cobalt Leather Gloves
CobaltLeatherGloves.flavorText: Thick durable leather gloves crafted from mixing Cobalt infused materials in the dye.

CobaltLightfootBoots.name: Cobalt Lightfoot Boots
CobaltLightfootBoots.flavorText: Made with light durable leather coated in cobalt, enabling swift movements.

CobaltOres.name: Cobalt Ore
CobaltOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock containing traces of shimmering blue cobalt.

CobaltPlateBoots.name: Cobalt Plate Boots
CobaltPlateBoots.flavorText: Heavy plate boots forged with Cobalt that provide complete foot protection.

CobaltPlatePants.name: Cobalt Plate Pants
CobaltPlatePants.flavorText: These plate pants made of Cobalt infused steel are like a fortress for the legs.

CobaltPowder.name: Cobalt Powder
CobaltPowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding Cobalt ore.

CobaltRegalGambeson.name: Cobalt Regal Gambeson
CobaltRegalGambeson.flavorText: A beautifully assembled padded chest of armor made from combining Cobalt dyes.

CobaltTemplarArmor.name: Cobalt Templar Armor
CobaltTemplarArmor.flavorText: A high-quality Templar chest, made with a mix of Cobalt ingots and fabrics infused with Cobalt dyes.

CobaltTrousers.name: Cobalt Trousers
CobaltTrousers.flavorText: Cobalt coated woven wool trousers, offering a strong yet flexible fit.

CobaltVikingHelm.name: Cobalt Viking Helm
CobaltVikingHelm.flavorText: Reinforced Cobalt steel covering the face and leather overlaid with a tight knit Cobalt chainmail.

CockatriceEgg.name: Cockatrice’s Egg
CockatriceEgg.flavorText: A deep amethyst egg, flecked with myriad tiny spots, lies before thee. With gentle care and tender affection, ‘tis said the egg may yet be persuaded to hatch.

CockatricesLuckyFeather.name: Cockatrice’s Lucky Feather
CockatricesLuckyFeather.flavorText: Legends speak of the Cockatrice's Lucky Feather, its vibrant crimson hue rumored to hold mysterious powers.

Coif.name: Coif
Coif.flavorText: A simple coif of supple fabric, its faint gold trim a quiet nod to its wearer's refined mastery of the arcane arts.

ConchShell.name: Conch Shell
ConchShell.flavorText: A spiral shell that holds the sound of the sea. When held to your ear, you can hear the sound of waves.

CopperIngots.name: Copper Ingot
CopperIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure Copper.

CopperOres.name: Copper Ore
CopperOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock containing traces of copper.

CopperPowder.name: Copper Powder
CopperPowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding Copper ore.

CopperlightAttire.name: Copperlight Attire
CopperlightAttire.flavorText: Blending functionality with a touch of wanderlust, this attire incorporates copper elements for durability, perfect for those who travel far and wide.

CopperlightGauntlets.name: Copperlight Gauntlets
CopperlightGauntlets.flavorText: Sturdy gauntlets made of solid copper, providing excellent protection and a gleaming, battle-ready appearance.

CopperlightKettleHat.name: Copperlight Kettle Hat
CopperlightKettleHat.flavorText: This Copper Kettle Hat, with its polished, rounded design, resembles a classic kettle, offering a practical headwear choice.

CopperlightLeggings.name: Copperlight Leggings
CopperlightLeggings.flavorText: Crafted from supple leather with embedded copper fibers, provide a perfect fusion of durability and style.

CopperlightLightfootBoots.name: Copperlight Lightfoot Boots
CopperlightLightfootBoots.flavorText: These boots combine the lightness needed for rapid movement with the added resilience of copper.

CopperlightOutfit.name: Copperlight Outfit
CopperlightOutfit.flavorText: A mystical tunic interwoven with copper, designed for those who delve into the arcane. It resonates with an aura of mystery and occult power.

CopperlightPants.name: Copperlight Pants
CopperlightPants.flavorText: These pants blend the conductivity of copper with a comfortable fit, ideal for rituals and mystical explorations.

CopperlightPlateBoots.name: Copperlight Plate Boots
CopperlightPlateBoots.flavorText: Boots that are reinforced with solid copper plates, offering exceptional protection for demanding terrains and battles.

CopperlightPlatePants.name: Copperlight Plate Pants
CopperlightPlatePants.flavorText: Reinforced with copper plates, offer exceptional protection, ideal for adventurers seeking both safety and style.

CopperlightRivetedGloves.name: Copperlight Riveted Gloves
CopperlightRivetedGloves.flavorText: Crafted for resilience, these gloves feature copper rivets, suitable for various demanding tasks.

CopperlightSanctumPlateArmor.name: Copperlight Sanctum Plate Armor
CopperlightSanctumPlateArmor.flavorText: This fashionable copper plate armor is heavy and strong, good against physical as well as magical attacks.

CopperlightShadowHood.name: Copperlight Shadow Hood
CopperlightShadowHood.flavorText: Designed for the stealthy and stylish, this hood is made with copper-woven fabric, giving it a mysterious, shadowy look with a hint of shimmer.

CopperlightStrawHat.name: Copperlight Straw Hat
CopperlightStrawHat.flavorText: Crafted from straw melded with copper, it's a sturdy, stylish choice for outdoor wear.

CopperlightTunic.name: Copperlight Tunic
CopperlightTunic.flavorText: A durable and versatile tunic, infused with copper fibers. Adventurous style suitable for any journey.

CoralFragment.name: Coral Fragment
CoralFragment.flavorText: A piece of coral grown beneath the sea. Its surface is hard and has a unique texture.

CoreofCinder.name: Core of Cinder
CoreofCinder.flavorText: A core left behind after a fire elemental’s death. Ash formed as its form burned during the moment of dissolution clings to it.

CorruptedHeart.name: Corrupted Heart
CorruptedHeart.flavorText: The corrupted heart of the Midnight Stag, still pulsating with dark energies, is said to have once tempted the king of these lands with promises of immense power. He succumbed, and paid dearly. Beware its seductive pull, lest you too fall victim to its curse.

CourtlyDress.name: Courtly Dress
CourtlyDress.flavorText: An attire crafted from fine, soft fabric. Accented with a leather vest and an embroidered shoulder cape, it completes the dignified air befitting the court.

CowlofDarkness.name: Cowl of Darkness
CowlofDarkness.flavorText: Crafted using forbidden fibers, the cowl's material holds the unsettling after touch of darkness.

CrackedLog.name: Cracked Log
CrackedLog.flavorText: A large damaged log cut from a tree.

CrackedTusk.name: Cracked Tusk
CrackedTusk.flavorText: A flame boar’s tusk. Unable to withstand the intense heat, its surface is cracked in several places.

CrimsonThreadSpool.name: Crimson Thread Spool
CrimsonThreadSpool.flavorText: A bundle of red thread neatly wound around a wooden spool.

CrocodilianEyeball.name: Crocodilian Eyeball
CrocodilianEyeball.flavorText: This yellow eye retains the reptilian trait of a vertical slit pupil, casting an unsettling sense of pressure upon those who meet its gaze.

Crossbow.name: Crossbow
Crossbow.flavorText: A powerful mechanical weapon, a single-shot crossbow with a crank that's very abrasive to the hand.

CrownoftheMidnightStag.name: Crown of the Midnight Stag
CrownoftheMidnightStag.flavorText: The crown of the elusive Midnight Stag exuded a sinister aura, a poignant emblem of the darkness this creature inadvertently propagated through these lands.

CrusaderArmor.name: Crusader Armor
CrusaderArmor.flavorText: Armor that allows for defensive and offensive movements. Protection against physical and magical attacks.

CrusaderHelm.name: Crusader Helm
CrusaderHelm.flavorText: A distinctive helmet adorned with a cross-shaped visor, a symbol of unwavering faith.

CrystalBall.name: Crystal Ball
CrystalBall.flavorText: A dense glass ball made of mysterious origins, able to harness and focus magical energy.

CrystalFrostRing.name: Crystal Frost Ring
CrystalFrostRing.flavorText: A shard of eternal winter trapped in cobalt, this ring saps warmth from the wearer’s soul, leaving behind only ice and silence.

CrystalSword.name: Crystal Sword
CrystalSword.flavorText: An enigma to what materials this blade is composed of, allowing magic to flow through it.

CuffedBoots.name: Cuffed Boots
CuffedBoots.flavorText: Constructed from sturdy leather, these boots feature a folded cuff at the top, designed for added flexibility and style.

CursedBandage.name: Cursed Bandage
CursedBandage.flavorText: A bloodstained bandage, steeped in the pain and screams of those lost to a horrific experiment. Offer it to the Nightmare Mummy, who will cleanse it and pray for the dead.

CursedBell.name: Cursed Bell
CursedBell.flavorText: When this bell is rung, a clear chime echoes out, but faintly within it is a sound like the dying scream of the Midnight Stag. If the bell is sounded atop the pentagram drawn somewhere within the Inferno, it will summon the Ghost King.

CursedCrown.name: Cursed Crown
CursedCrown.flavorText: A majestic crown befitting the ruler of this domain, forever the eternal sovereignty over the darkness.

Cutlass.name: Cutlass
Cutlass.flavorText: A blade curved with a gentle arc, perfected for slashing. Its finely honed tip was designed to catch and turn aside an opponent’s weapon in the midst of battle.

CuttlefishInkSac.name: Cuttlefish Ink Sac
CuttlefishInkSac.flavorText: A pouch filled with the jet-black ink released in moments of danger. When used as ink, it retains its deep color for a long time.

CyclopsClub.name: Cyclops’s Club
CyclopsClub.flavorText: A massive bludgeon, carved from ancient trees, embodying the might of the one-eyed behemoths.

CyclopsEye.name: Cyclops Eye
CyclopsEye.flavorText: A colossal ocular relic, a dark souvenir from the realm of one-eyed beings.

CyclopsPreciousMirror.name: Cyclops Precious Mirror
CyclopsPreciousMirror.flavorText: A small hand mirror crafted in an antique style. One corner is broken, rendering it useless as a mirror. It appears to be a treasured item to a cyclops.

CyclopsRags.name: Cyclops Rags
CyclopsRags.flavorText: Frayed attire from a cyclops, made up of rough fabrics and scavenged materials.

CyclopsVisionCrystal.name: Cyclops Vision Crystal
CyclopsVisionCrystal.flavorText: Infused with the essence of a Cyclops eye, merging the undeniable strength with the mysteries of arcane magic.

DaggerOfRighteousness.name: Dagger of Righteousness
DaggerOfRighteousness.flavorText: Featuring minimalistic silver designs, is perfect for those who value subtlety and effectiveness.

DarkCassock.name: Dark Cassock
DarkCassock.flavorText: A cassock reserved for the high clergy. Dark in hue, it is adorned with a crimson stole edged in gold, a symbol of authority.

DarkCuirass.name: Dark Cuirass
DarkCuirass.flavorText: Forged from obsidian-infused steel offering exceptional protection, shielding its wearer from devastating blows.

DarkLeatherLeggings.name: Dark Leather Leggings
DarkLeatherLeggings.flavorText: Crafted from supple, dark leather that melds seamlessly with the night.

DarkMatter.name: Dark Matter
DarkMatter.flavorText: Concentrated particles of dark matter, exuding an otherworldly energy that defies comprehension.

DarkMatterTunic.name: Dark Matter Tunic
DarkMatterTunic.flavorText: Interwoven with arcane materials, this garment harnesses its core strength from dark matter derived from malevolent sources—don it with caution.

DarkPaddedHose.name: Dark Padded Hose
DarkPaddedHose.flavorText: Dark-colored hose, lightly padded for warmth and impact absorption.

DarkPlateArmor.name: Dark Plate Armor
DarkPlateArmor.flavorText: This fashionable dark plate armor is heavy and strong, good against physical as well as magical attacks.

DarkgroveHood.name: Darkgrove Hood
DarkgroveHood.flavorText: Made from treated leather, designed for durability and resilience in outdoor environments, its design subtly inspired by nature.

DarkgroveRobe.name: Darkgrove Robe
DarkgroveRobe.flavorText: A robe crafted from natural fibers, imbued with the essence of the forest. Its earthy tones and soft texture resonate with the tranquility of nature.

DarkleafBoots.name: Darkleaf Boots
DarkleafBoots.flavorText: Renowned for their unique blend of flexibility and durability, a testament to the craftsmanship of woodland artisans.

DashingBoots.name: Dashing Boots
DashingBoots.flavorText: Crafted with sleek lines and a polished finish, providing a comfortable and glove-like fit that allows for effortless movement.

DeathstepBoots.name: Deathstep Boots
DeathstepBoots.flavorText: Boots designed solely for speed. The sole uses the light, springy shell of an insect, while the outer layer is lined with delicate wings. When worn, the wearer moves with a gliding swiftness, but the boots offer no protection. Taking even a single hit can be crippling. Suited for those who must move fast, even at great risk.

DemonBlood.name: Demon Blood
DemonBlood.flavorText: A vial filled with the corrupted life essence of a demon, pulsating with evil energy.

DemonDogThorns.name: Demon Dog Thorn
DemonDogThorns.flavorText: Needle-like points ready to deliver a painful reminder of the creatures that bore them.

DemonGripGloves.name: Demon Grip Gloves
DemonGripGloves.flavorText: Crafted with high-tensile materials, augmented by demonic fragments, exhibiting near-sentient tendencies.

DemoncladLeggings.name: Demonclad Leggings
DemoncladLeggings.flavorText: Crafted using demonic remnants, granting it a malevolent sentience.

DemonsGlee.name: Demon's Glee
DemonsGlee.flavorText: A blade fused with unholy blood is said to become almost sentient, craving destruction.

Diamond.name: Diamond (Cracked)
Diamond.flavorText: A beautiful rock that scatters light in a vibrant ray of dancing colors.

DiaryoftheToz.name: Diary of the Toz
DiaryoftheToz.flavorText: The king's former court wizard, composed this haunting diary detailing his descent into the darkest arcane arts to satisfy the king’s sinister ambitions. His quest for forbidden knowledge turned him into a Lich, eternally chained to the castle he cursed with his master, a chilling reflection on the price of unwavering loyalty to dark magic.

DivineAxe.name: Divine Axe
DivineAxe.flavorText: A formidable double-sided axe with silver adornments, combining raw power with a raw power.

DivineBlade.name: Divine Blade
DivineBlade.flavorText: A weapon of divine retribution, its hefty weight is balanced by the precision with which it cleaves through foes.

DivineBow.name: Divine Bow
DivineBow.flavorText: With its silver-infused craftsmanship, this bow is as visually striking as it is effective.

DivineDagger.name: Divine Dagger
DivineDagger.flavorText: The silver detailing on this dagger elevates its appeal, making it a prized possession for any skilled wielder.

DivineRod.name: Divine Rod
DivineRod.flavorText: With its simple silver inclusions, this mace is a solid choice for those facing undead opponents.

DivineShortSword.name: Divine Short Sword
DivineShortSword.flavorText: A straightforward weapon, its silver edge makes it a dependable choice in combat against undead entities.

DivineStaff.name: Divine Staff
DivineStaff.flavorText: Expertly crafted, is an ideal fusion of power and grace, suitable for both defensive and offensive maneuvers.

DoctorsBag.name: Doctor's Bag
DoctorsBag.flavorText: An old medical bag, now empty inside.

DogCollar.name: Dog Collar
DogCollar.flavorText: Tangible proof of your triumph over the menacing beasts that roam the shadows.

DoubleAxe.name: Double Axe
DoubleAxe.flavorText: This heavy formidable weapon is capable of delivering devastating blows from both ends.

Doublet.name: Doublet
Doublet.flavorText: Lightweight and breathable. Typically favored by those who prefer to blend in.

DreadHood.name: Dread Hood
DreadHood.flavorText: Crafted using the remnants of the demonic, imbuing it with a thirst for devastation.

Drum.name: Drum
Drum.flavorText: Assembled from a sturdy wooden frame with stretched hide over both ends, filling the air with rhythmic vibrations.

DryadMask.name: Dryad Mask
DryadMask.flavorText: A wooden mask carved in the image of a dryad. It is used in forest rites to pray for a successful hunt.

Ectoplasm.name: Ectoplasm
Ectoplasm.flavorText: Emitting an otherworldly glow, this ectoplasm pulses with secrets from beyond the veil. Many are drawn to its mysterious energy and covet its elusive power.

ElkwoodCrown.name: Elkwood Crown
ElkwoodCrown.flavorText: Combining the durability of leather with the elegance of nature, this hat, adorned with branch-like antlers, is a stylish nod to the wilderness.

ElkwoodGloves.name: Elkwood Gloves
ElkwoodGloves.flavorText: These gloves feature antler embellishments, a mark of the forest's blessing.

EmberGem.name: Ember Gem
EmberGem.flavorText: It is a gem that holds a smoldering ember within. It is finely cut, as if crafted to fit perfectly somewhere.

Emerald.name: Emerald (Cracked)
Emerald.flavorText: A radiant rock of mesmerizing green.

EnchantedDarkFabric.name: Enchanted Dark Fabric
EnchantedDarkFabric.flavorText: A mystical fabric woven in the depths of darkness, radiating an otherworldly aura.

EtchedWandFragment.name: Etched Wand Fragment
EtchedWandFragment.flavorText: A fragment broken from the staff of a Tidewalker shaman. Its surface is etched with indecipherable symbols and markings, and it carries a shamanic aura similar to that of the seaweed necklace.

ExplosiveBottle.name: Explosive Bottle
ExplosiveBottle.flavorText: A bottle containing a flammable mixture that explodes when ignited and thrown.

ExtraThickPelts.name: Extra Thick Pelt
ExtraThickPelts.flavorText: This pelt boasts an exceptional thickness, offering unparalleled protection against the biting cold.

Eyepatch.name: Eyepatch
Eyepatch.flavorText: An eyepatch made of leather. Used to cover a wound or protect the eye.

FabricShears.name: Fabric Shears
FabricShears.flavorText: Heavy shears designed for cutting large bolts of fabric. The long, weighted blades require a skilled hand to use properly.

FairysRequiem.name: Requiem of the Fairy
FairysRequiem.flavorText: This spellbook, written in the language of the fae, is filled with a melody of sorrow. The reader instinctively understands its emotions, but must take care not to lose themselves to the book’s overwhelming grief.

Falchion.name: Falchion
Falchion.flavorText: A curved iron blade and broad hilt, the curvature of the blade is foreign and enigmatic.

FalchionofHonor.name: Falchion of Honor
FalchionofHonor.flavorText: There is no question of honor or skill for those whom wield this blade.

FangsofDeathNecklace.name: Fangs of Death Necklace
FangsofDeathNecklace.flavorText: Necklace crafted using a unique combination of teeth acquired from different beasts.

FeatheredHat.name: Feathered Hat
FeatheredHat.flavorText: A fashionable hat crafted with soft, silky feathers.

FellingAxe.name: Felling Axe
FellingAxe.flavorText: Forged with aged wood and sturdy metal, it's rigid blade can cut through most surface.

FineCuirass.name: Fine Cuirass
FineCuirass.flavorText: This armor makes living in impossible situations suddenly possible. Plate armor, uncomfortable to wear and quite heavy.

FireflyAbdomen.name: Firefly's Abdomen
FireflyAbdomen.flavorText: A preserved firefly's abdomen, emitting a radiant beacon of light.

FlameGasBag.name: Flame Gas Bag
FlameGasBag.flavorText: This is a specialized organ located beneath the lungs of a Cockatrice. It contains the gas once used to breathe fire.

FlangedMace.name: Flanged Mace
FlangedMace.flavorText: A slow and heavy mace designed with crown-shaped blunt edges, supporting even reckless swings.

FlickeringEmber.name: Flickering Ember
FlickeringEmber.flavorText: A small ember left behind by a fire spirit. It does not easily go out and faint whispers can be heard if you listen closely.

Flute.name: Flute
Flute.flavorText: It is carefully carved into a slender frame made of treated cedar.

ForestBoots.name: Forest Boots
ForestBoots.flavorText: The boots' color palette is designed to blend harmoniously with forest surroundings.

ForestHood.name: Forest Hood
ForestHood.flavorText: A hood that looks like it can hide well in the leaves.

FoulBoots.name: Foul Boots
FoulBoots.flavorText: Assembled from the tail fibers of a centaur, augmented with maggots, and activated by demonic elements.

FoxPendant.name: Fox Pendant
FoxPendant.flavorText: Designed to enhance ones nimbleness, echoing the fox’s swift and graceful movements.

FranciscaAxe.name: Francisca Axe
FranciscaAxe.flavorText: A Lightweight small throwing axe that can take out enemies from a distance.

Frock.name: Frock
Frock.flavorText: Made with broadcloth, a much heavier wool. Humble and modest.

FrostAmulet.name: Frost Amulet
FrostAmulet.flavorText: Radiating a frosty aura, allowing one to deliver more potent sharpness to their physical blows.

FrostStoneIngots.name: Froststone Ingot
FrostStoneIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure Froststone, it maintains an unyielding cold even in the fiercest heat.

FrostStoneOres.name: Froststone Ore
FrostStoneOres.flavorText: A chunk of raw material that pulses with the eternal cold of the frozen abyss.

FrostStonePowder.name: Froststone Powder
FrostStonePowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding Froststone ore.

FrostWyvernClaws.name: Frost Wyvern's Claws
FrostWyvernClaws.flavorText: These razor-sharp talons, forged from glacial ice, are as formidable as the beasts that wield them.

FrostWyvernEgg.name: Frost Wyvern Egg
FrostWyvernEgg.flavorText: Mystical egg, cool to the touch, encapsulating the delicate balance of fragility and resilience.

FrostWyvernsHide.name: Frost Wyvern's Hide
FrostWyvernsHide.flavorText: A dense, frost-encrusted layer torn from the icy beast's form. It gleams with the frozen essence of the abyss, a testament to the Wyvern's mastery over the icy expanse.

FrostbittenMallet.name: Frostbitten Mallet
FrostbittenMallet.flavorText: A hammer forged from the essence of cold gathered from the monsters of Frost Mountain. It is the only weapon capable of shattering the sealed wyvern statue, which no ordinary weapon can break. Once the statue is destroyed, the Frost Wyvern will awaken.

FrostedFeather.name: Frosted Feather
FrostedFeather.flavorText: This feather, taken from the Ice Harpy’s wings and covered in an eternal layer of frost, embodies the icy spirit of its frigid realm.

FrostlightAbyssPlateArmor.name: Frostlight Abyss Plate Armor
FrostlightAbyssPlateArmor.flavorText: A striking set of plate armor forged from a rare ore that pulses with eternal frost, providing both a stalwart defense and an intimidating presence.

FrostlightAketon.name: Frostlight Aketon
FrostlightAketon.flavorText: A quilted armor pulsing with the cold of the frozen abyss, offering flexible protection that adapts to the wearer's movements.

FrostlightCloak.name: Frostlight Cloak
FrostlightCloak.flavorText: Crafted from fabrics touched by the eternal chill, this cloak offers a serene yet powerful presence, echoing the quiet strength of ancient ice.

FrostlightCrusaderHelm.name: Frostlight Crusader Helm
FrostlightCrusaderHelm.flavorText: An imposing crusader helm crafted from Froststone Ingots, intertwining the chilling touch of the frozen abyss with the enduring might of the noble and the devout.

FrostlightCrystalSword.name: Frostlight Crystal Sword
FrostlightCrystalSword.flavorText: Skillfully crafted and imbued with the enduring cold of Froststone, this crystal sword seamlessly integrates magic, transforming into an adept vessel for arcane power.

FrostlightFeatheredHat.name: Frostlight Feathered Hat
FrostlightFeatheredHat.flavorText: A charming hat infused with Froststone Powder, merging the perpetual frost of the frozen abyss with the quick-witted finesse of the nimble and clever.

FrostlightGauntlets.name: Frostlight Gauntlets
FrostlightGauntlets.flavorText: Forged from mystical Froststone, these gauntlets meld the biting chill of eternal ice with a rugged, battle-ready construction.

FrostlightHood.name: Frostlight Hood
FrostlightHood.flavorText: A sleek hood crafted from Froststone Powder, intertwining the frigid touch of the frozen abyss with dark allure.

FrostlightLanternShield.name: Frostlight Lantern Shield
FrostlightLanternShield.flavorText: This shield emanates an everlasting cold that remains steadfast even in the most intense environments. Its retractable blade and lantern offer invaluable support for combat and exploration.

FrostlightLeatherLeggings.name: Frostlight Leather Leggings
FrostlightLeatherLeggings.flavorText: Crafted from reinforced leather and suffused with timeless cold, these leggings offer agile movement with the glacial strength of the abyss.

FrostlightLightfootBoots.name: Frostlight Lightfoot Boots
FrostlightLightfootBoots.flavorText: Light and durable, these leather boots are imbued with the arcane resilience of froststone, ensuring swift movement through diverse challenges.

FrostlightMysticGloves.name: Frostlight Mystic Gloves
FrostlightMysticGloves.flavorText: Exquisitely crafted and intricately designed, these gloves draw from the frozen abyss, allowing spellcasters to wield their magic with finesse.

FrostlightNormanNasalHelm.name: Frostlight Norman Nasal Helm
FrostlightNormanNasalHelm.flavorText: A fierce helm wrought from Froststone Ingots, merging the glacial force of the frozen abyss with the primal fury of its bearer.

FrostlightOracleRobe.name: Frostlight Oracle Robe
FrostlightOracleRobe.flavorText: A flowing robe imbued with the frost of ancient realms, enhancing the wearer’s mystical presence with an ethereal chill.

FrostlightPlateBoots.name: Frostlight Plate Boots
FrostlightPlateBoots.flavorText: Provides formidable protection, powered by the icy essence of the frozen abyss, though their clunkiness might slow you down a bit.

FrostlightPlatePants.name: Frostlight Plate Pants
FrostlightPlatePants.flavorText: Sturdy plate pants forged from froststone ore, integrating the icy resilience of the frozen abyss into every plate and rivet.

FrostlightRivetedGloves.name: Frostlight Riveted Gloves
FrostlightRivetedGloves.flavorText: Riveted with enchanted froststone, these gloves offer a seamless blend of the abyss's icy power and rugged durability.

FrostlightRuggedBoots.name: Frostlight Rugged Boots
FrostlightRuggedBoots.flavorText: Combining thick leather and compact fur lining, these boots are infused with froststone’s chilling essence, offering both warmth and formidable durability.

FrostlightRunestoneGloves.name: Frostlight Runestone Gloves
FrostlightRunestoneGloves.flavorText: These leather gloves, inlaid with froststone facets, offer a perfect blend of flexibility and the frigid power of mystical frozen ice.

FrostlightSpear.name: Frostlight Spear
FrostlightSpear.flavorText: This spear combines the piercing power of a traditional spear with the icy might of the frozen abyss, making each attack chillingly effective.

FrostlightTrousers.name: Frostlight Trousers
FrostlightTrousers.flavorText: Woven from light, enchanted fabric, these trousers are permeated with infinite freeze, offering both dexterity and the relentless chill of the glacial depths.

FrostlightWarMaul.name: Frostlight War Maul
FrostlightWarMaul.flavorText: A War Maul forged from refined Froststone. The frozen head is strong enough to shatter any metal, and its icy chill seeps into the wielder’s hands. Thick gloves are essential to wield it.

FrostlightWardenOutfit.name: Frostlight Warden Outfit
FrostlightWardenOutfit.flavorText: An ensemble that blends the resilience of the frozen abyss with the natural agility of the wilderness, offering a balance of strength and flexibility.

FrostlightWizardHat.name: Frostlight Wizard Hat
FrostlightWizardHat.flavorText: An exquisite creation fashioned from Froststone Powder, combining the chilling power of the frozen abyss with arcane elegance.

FrozenClaw.name: Frozen Claw
FrozenClaw.flavorText: A claw that fell from an Ice Hound. Though its tip is slightly chipped from the aftermath of a fierce struggle, a lingering chill still clings to it.

FrozenHeart.name: Frozen Heart
FrozenHeart.flavorText: From the lifeless blue heart of the already deceased Wendigo, emanates a chilling aura of ruthless death, pulsating with a faint heartbeat.

FrozenIronKey.name: Frozen Iron Key
FrozenIronKey.flavorText: A weathered iron key encased in frost, hinting at locked mysteries buried in the coldest reaches.

GallantOutfit.name: Gallant Outfit
GallantOutfit.flavorText: An attire crafted for courtly feasts and ceremonies. With puffed sleeves and tooled leather decorations, it gives a more splendid impression.

GemNecklace.name: Gem Necklace (Cracked)
GemNecklace.flavorText: This silver necklace with such a magnificent red stone was clearly made for Royalty.

GemRing.name: Gem Ring (Cracked)
GemRing.flavorText: This gold ring, adorned with a gleaming jade gem, is the epitome of wealth and luxury.

GhostdustPouch.name: Ghostdust Pouch
GhostdustPouch.flavorText: A small pouch, yet within it lies dust that holds the power to uncover secrets. Throw it, and watch as the invisible become visible, bathed in golden light.

GhostlyEssence.name: Ghostly Essence
GhostlyEssence.flavorText: Spiritual residue, harvested from a powerful vanquished apparition. Its spectral hue hints at the ethereal energies pulsating within.

GiantBatEar.name: Giant Bat Ear
GiantBatEar.flavorText: These tiny sensory receptors amplify sound vibrations and facilitate precise auditory processing.

GiantBatHide.name: Giant Bat Hide
GiantBatHide.flavorText: A pelt with a velvety texture.

GiantHorn.name: Giant Horn
GiantHorn.flavorText: This large horn is coated with sticky clumps of the Inferno’s rot, so caution is needed when handling it barehanded.

GiantToe.name: Giant Toe
GiantToe.flavorText: A severed toe from a giant, its nail discolored and emitting a faint odor that lingers in the air.

GingerbreadCookies.name: Gingerbread Cookie
GingerbreadCookies.flavorText:
"Run, run, run, fast as you can. You can't catch me, I'm the Gingerbread Man!"
- G.B.M

Gjermundbu.name: Gjermundbu
Gjermundbu.flavorText: Reinforced metal that cover most of the head and face, transitioning to flexible chainmail for lower half.

GlovesOfUtility.name: Gloves of Utility
GlovesOfUtility.flavorText: Sturdy utilitarian gloves allowing for good grip and quick interaction with objects.

GlowingBlueIceEyes.name: Glowing Blue Ice Eyes
GlowingBlueIceEyes.flavorText: Shimmering with a blue glow, these eerie orbs retain the same coldness as their spectral gaze.

GlowingOrangeEye.name: Glowing Orange Eye
GlowingOrangeEye.flavorText: This eyeball, taken from the corpse of a Cerberus, holds an ominous orange glow.

GoatHideRug.name: Goat Hide Rug
GoatHideRug.flavorText: A rug crafted from carefully treated goat hide. Its natural shape and fur texture remain largely intact.

GoblinEars.name: Goblin Ear
GoblinEars.flavorText: Goblins regard their ears as more than simple features; these appendages are revered as symbols of status and honor. The severed ears collected from fallen goblins are tangible proof of triumph.

GoldBangle1I.name: Triple Gem Bangle (Cracked)
GoldBangle1I.flavorText: A flamboyant bracelet for the rich.

GoldBangle1J.name: Leaf Gold Bangle (Cracked)
GoldBangle1J.flavorText: An elaborate and ornamented golden band.

GoldBangle2D.name: Slim Bangle (Cracked)
GoldBangle2D.flavorText: A flashy and sumptuous gold bracelet.

GoldBangle2G.name: Glimmer Bangle (Cracked)
GoldBangle2G.flavorText: An elegant golden band of metal to be worn around the wrist.

GoldBangle2H.name: Shine Bangle (Cracked)
GoldBangle2H.flavorText: A brilliant gilded band of gold.

GoldCandelabra.name: Gold Candelabra (Cracked)
GoldCandelabra.flavorText: A splendid method to display your wealth and light up the room.

GoldCandleHolder.name: Gold Candle Holder (Cracked)
GoldCandleHolder.flavorText: A fancy holder for expensive wax candles.

GoldCandlePlatter.name: Gold Candle Platter (Cracked)
GoldCandlePlatter.flavorText: A fine platter used to prevent wax from dirtying the floor.

GoldChaliceA.name: Gold Goblet (Cracked)
GoldChaliceA.flavorText: A wonderful container for some well balanced wine.

GoldChaliceB.name: Gold Chalice (Cracked)
GoldChaliceB.flavorText: A little too extravagant for just common ale.

GoldCoinBag.name: Gold Coin Bag
GoldCoinBag.flavorText: A bag capable of holding a hefty amount of gold coins.

GoldCoinChest.name: Gold Coin Chest
GoldCoinChest.flavorText: A chest that can hold a lot of gold coins.

GoldCoinPouch.name: Gold Coin Pouch
GoldCoinPouch.flavorText: A pouch that can hold quite a bit of gold coins.

GoldCoinPurse.name: Gold Coin Purse
GoldCoinPurse.flavorText: A purse that can hold golden coins.

GoldCoins.name: Gold Coin
GoldCoins.flavorText: A gold coin that emits a beautiful golden color.

GoldCrown.name: Gold Crown (Cracked)
GoldCrown.flavorText: Heavy is the head that wears this crown.

GoldIngots.name: Gold Ingot
GoldIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure gold.

GoldOres.name: Gold Ore
GoldOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock containing traces of gleaming gold.

GoldPowder.name: Gold Powder
GoldPowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding gold ore.

GoldWaterpot.name: Gold Waterpot (Cracked)
GoldWaterpot.flavorText: Used to water very fancy plants.

GoldenArmet.name: Golden Armet
GoldenArmet.flavorText: Molded from gold with movable face and cheek armor, fully protecting the head from blows.

GoldenBoots.name: Golden Boots
GoldenBoots.flavorText: Heavy-duty boots crafted from robust gold, lined with dense, golden woolly fur, offering both unparalleled durability and luxurious warmth.

GoldenChausses.name: Golden Chausses
GoldenChausses.flavorText: Golden leather pants that provide flexible protection.

GoldenCloak.name: Golden Cloak
GoldenCloak.flavorText: Crafted from fine golden fibers, this luxurious cloak is a mark of high status.

GoldenFellingAxe.name: Golden Felling Axe
GoldenFellingAxe.flavorText: A luxuriously crafted axe with a golden sharp edge ensures practical utility alongside its ornamental value.

GoldenGauntlets.name: Golden Gauntlets
GoldenGauntlets.flavorText: Made from fine gold plates offering maximum protection for your digits.

GoldenGjermundbu.name: Golden Gjermundbu
GoldenGjermundbu.flavorText: Reinforced with gold that covers most of the head and face, transitioning to flexible golden chainmail.

GoldenGloves.name: Golden Gloves
GoldenGloves.flavorText: Made with thick yet flexible golden hide. Adjustable wrist bracing offering extra support and reinforcement.

GoldenHounskull.name: Golden Hounskull
GoldenHounskull.flavorText: A gold helmet that provides extensive protection for the face.

GoldenKey.name: Golden Key
GoldenKey.flavorText: An intricate golden key that may lead to priceless treasure.

GoldenLeafHood.name: Golden Leaf Hood
GoldenLeafHood.flavorText: Crafted with golden fabrics helping you blend into your environment with ease.

GoldenLeggings.name: Golden Leggings
GoldenLeggings.flavorText: Made using a much thicker, heavier golden infused leather. Added protection over the knees.

GoldenPaddedTunic.name: Golden Padded Tunic
GoldenPaddedTunic.flavorText: Made from quilting golden materials, offering flexible soft armor that allows for mobility with ease.

GoldenPlateBoots.name: Golden Plate Boots
GoldenPlateBoots.flavorText: Provides physical protection made from heavy golden plates however, definitely harder to sneak around in.

GoldenPlatePants.name: Golden Plate Pants
GoldenPlatePants.flavorText: Extremely heavy gold plate pants, compromising speed for extra protection.

GoldenPlate.name: Golden Plate
GoldenPlate.flavorText: Golden Plate armor, extremely strong however, uncomfortable to wear and quite heavy.

GoldenRobe.name: Golden Robe
GoldenRobe.flavorText: A bewitching garment crafted using materials derived from gold that weaves together style and sorcery.

GoldenScarf.name: Golden Scarf
GoldenScarf.flavorText: A facemask woven using golden materials, making the wearer appear mysterious.

GoldenScriptureofSolaris.name: Golden Scripture of Solaris
GoldenScriptureofSolaris.flavorText: A gaudy scripture forged from a rich man's vanity, shining like the sun when it catches the light. Made entirely of solid gold, cover and pages alike, it is far too heavy to be called a book. It holds no magic despite its sacred form, but its sheer weight makes it a surprisingly dangerous weapon.

GoldenSkulltoken.name: Golden Skull Token
GoldenSkulltoken.flavorText: A skull token whose golden shimmer illuminates the tale of a thousand adventures.

GoldenTeeth.name: Golden Teeth
GoldenTeeth.flavorText: Crafted from pure gold, symbolizing both refinement and extravagance, a mark of distinction.

GoldenVikingSword.name: Golden Viking Sword
GoldenVikingSword.flavorText: A striking blend of battle-readiness and grandeur, featuring a golden blade, symbolizing both might and wealth.

GrandBrigandine.name: Grand Brigandine
GrandBrigandine.flavorText: Featuring crafted combination of metal and padded fabric segments.

GraveEssence.name: Grave Essence
GraveEssence.flavorText: The soil from the depths of the grave, holding the whispers of departed souls.

GravewolfGloves.name: Gravewolf Gloves
GravewolfGloves.flavorText: Woven from the pelts of wolves, these gloves resonate with the fierce energy of the wild.

GreatHelm.name: Great Helm
GreatHelm.flavorText: This heavy helm offers a significant amount of protection against head attacks.

GreenThreadSpool.name: Green Thread Spool
GreenThreadSpool.flavorText: A bundle of green thread neatly wound around a wooden spool.

GrimSlayer.name: Grimslayer
GrimSlayer.flavorText: This crimson blade can cut through what cannot be seen, and even those who have long since died and forgotten all sensation writhe once more in agony beneath its edge.

GrimsmileRing.name: Grimsmile Ring
GrimsmileRing.flavorText: Ring crafted using rare golden teeth extracted from the silenced mouths of defeated rivals.

Halberd.name: Halberd
Halberd.flavorText: A two handed pole-arm with a long reach, devised with an axe blade containing a sharp spike firmly fasted to the end.

HandCannon.name: Hand Cannon
HandCannon.flavorText: A straight-barreled firearm forged from heavy metal. Though it takes time to reload, its firepower is strong enough to pierce even the thickest armor.

HandCrossbow.name: Hand Crossbow
HandCrossbow.flavorText: A small crossbow that seems suitable for holding and shooting with one hand.

HardCrabShell.name: Hard Crab Shell
HardCrabShell.flavorText: The shell of a pinchclaw crab, as hard as stone and difficult to damage even with most weapons.

HardenedShellFragment.name: Hardened Shell Fragment
HardenedShellFragment.flavorText: A fragment of a lava turtle’s shell with a rugged uneven surface. It is as hard as aged stone and remarkably heavy for its size.

Hatchet.name: Hatchet
Hatchet.flavorText: Compact in size and balanced weight makes it easy to wield for both utility and combat purposes.

HazeBlade.name: Haze Blade
HazeBlade.flavorText: In a late-night escapade, a tipsy wizard and an equally sloshed blacksmith clumsily combined their crafts, spilling enchanted ale on a blade mid-forging. The result was this bewitched sword, leaving foes as befuddled and dazed as its creators on that fateful evening.

HealingPotion.name: Potion of Healing
HealingPotion.flavorText: Potion used to recover a bit of health.

HeaterShield.name: Heater Shield
HeaterShield.flavorText: Made from attenuated wood overlaid with leather, providing more defenses and stability against brunt attacks.

HeavyBoots.name: Heavy Boots
HeavyBoots.flavorText: Heavy duty boots lined with thick wooly fur, that can help the wearer overcome hurdles or stand firm and strong.

HeavyGambeson.name: Heavy Gambeson
HeavyGambeson.flavorText: Robust padded armor garment, with layers of thick, quilted fabric, offering formidable protection.

HeavyGauntlet.name: Heavy Gauntlets
HeavyGauntlet.flavorText: Made from fine plate steel offering maximum protection for your digits.

HeavyLeatherLeggings.name: Heavy Leather Leggings
HeavyLeatherLeggings.flavorText: Made using a much thicker, heavier leather. Added protection over the knees.

HerbPouch.name: Herb Pouch
HerbPouch.flavorText: A leather pouch made for carrying herbs. Inside are a few herbs, as if someone had gathered them but never finished.

HolyRobe.name: Holy Robe
HolyRobe.flavorText: A common wool robe made for those of faith. It may be itchy against the skin but at least you will be warm.

HoneyblissPear.name: Honeybliss Pear
HoneyblissPear.flavorText: An exquisite pear that reveals a symphony of flavors, with a burst of sweetness and a delicate hint of honeyed nectar in every bite.

HornOfCentaur.name: Centaur Horn
HornOfCentaur.flavorText: Obsidian horn of a centaur demon, its ridged surface gleaming with an unearthly darkness.

HorsemansAxe.name: Horseman's Axe
HorsemansAxe.flavorText: A nimble axe, forged with a thin hilt that makes it suitable for one hand, enabling mobility in battle.

Horseshoe.name: Horseshoe
Horseshoe.flavorText: An iron fitting shed from a horse’s hoof. Its underside is worn in many places, bearing witness to countless journeys past.

Hounskull.name: Hounskull
Hounskull.flavorText: A sheet metal helmet that provides extensive protection for the face.

Hourglass.name: Hourglass
Hourglass.flavorText: An hourglass filled with sand inside a transparent glass tube. Time is measured by the falling grains.

HumanRemains.name: Human Remains
HumanRemains.flavorText: The unidentified remains of a human. Bones lie scattered among filthy soil. Found in the place seen by the leatherworker in his dreams.

HuntingTrap.name: Hunting Trap
HuntingTrap.flavorText: A spring-loaded hunting trap, waiting to snap shut on unsuspecting prey.

HuntressGoldEmblem.name: Huntress’ Gold Emblem
HuntressGoldEmblem.flavorText: An emblem awarded to those who have endured the Huntress’s most arduous assignments. Bearing the radiant brilliance of the sun, this emblem stands as a symbol of an adventurer’s honor and glory.

HuntressSilverEmblem.name: Huntress’ Silver Emblem
HuntressSilverEmblem.flavorText: An emblem awarded to those who complete the Huntress’s assignments. This silver emblem, gleaming with the cold clarity of moonlight, bears witness to an adventurer’s courage and relentless resolve.

Icefang.name: Icefang
Icefang.flavorText: A blade born of the frozen north, its chilling touch leaves behind frostbitten wounds that are rumored to never thaw.

InfectedFlesh.name: Infected Flesh
InfectedFlesh.flavorText: A vile piece of flesh, tainted by insidious infection, emanating a nauseating stench.

InkwellandQuillPen.name: Inkwell and Quill Pen
InkwellandQuillPen.flavorText: A small glass inkwell paired with a feather quill. The tip glides smoothly across the page, but the ink easily smudges if left to dry too slowly.

IntactSkull.name: Intact Skull
IntactSkull.flavorText: A perfectly preserved skull, devoid of any blemishes.

IntricateWoodenFigurine.name: Intricate Wooden Figurine
IntricateWoodenFigurine.flavorText: A small wooden figurine delicately carved by hand. The sculptor's artistic spirit can still be felt.

InvisibilityPotion.name: Potion of Invisibility
InvisibilityPotion.flavorText: Become invisible when used. The spell is broken when the target moves or performs an action.

IronChain.name: Iron Chain
IronChain.flavorText: A thick iron chain left untouched for years. Its rusted surface gives off a sharp, metallic stench.

IronIngots.name: Iron Ingot
IronIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure iron.

IronOres.name: Iron Ore
IronOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock containing traces of iron.

IronPowder.name: Iron Powder
IronPowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding iron ore.

JellyfishGlowEssence.name: Jellyfish Glow Essence
JellyfishGlowEssence.flavorText: A gelatinous fluid harvested from a luminous jellyfish. It emits its own light in darkness, its brightness undiminished even in the deepest seas.

JesterCap.name: Jester Cap
JesterCap.flavorText: A comical jester’s hat with crooked horns, each tipped with a small bauble that jingles noisily with every move.

JesterOutfit.name: Jester Outfit
JesterOutfit.flavorText: An outfit of glossy fabric adorned with exaggerated trims. Its comical appearance shines especially in festivals and performances.

JesterPants.name: Jester Pants
JesterPants.flavorText: Pants with different colors on each leg, standing out all the more. With every step, they exude a playful charm.

JesterPoulaines.name: Jester Poulaines
JesterPoulaines.flavorText: Shoes with elongated toes and exaggerated ankle adornments, sure to draw the eyes of others wherever you go.

KettleHat.name: Kettle Hat
KettleHat.flavorText: Strong and functional, not only offering protection against head attacks but from bad hair days.

KneadBloodBag.name: Knead Blood Bag
KneadBloodBag.flavorText: A blood bag extracted from the body of a Hell Maggot. Clumps of decay and sticky blood are mixed inside, slowly solidifying.

KoboldEar.name: Kobold's Ear
KoboldEar.flavorText: Leathery in texture and encased in frost, these ears bear traces of what appears to be black earwax.

KrampusCoin.name: Krampus' Coin
KrampusCoin.flavorText: A coin engraved with Krampus’s face. It is a small token of his favor, given only to those who have done good.

KrampusGoldenBell.name: Krampus’ Golden Bell
KrampusGoldenBell.flavorText: This small golden bell, known for its clear and gentle chime, can only be obtained by those who have truly pleased Krampus. It is said that those who ring it are granted a special blessing from him.

KrampusSilverBell.name: Krampus’ Silver Bell
KrampusSilverBell.flavorText: This small silver bell, known for its clear and gentle chime, can only be found during the winter when Krampus appears. It is said that those who ring it are granted a small blessing from him.

KrisDagger.name: Kris Dagger
KrisDagger.flavorText: A wavy blade that causes multiple jagged wounds with every stab. It's handle, also curved for a better grip.

LacedTurnshoe.name: Laced Turnshoe
LacedTurnshoe.flavorText: Thick hide shoes, topped with a blend of cotton and wool laces to ensure a good fit.

LanternShield.name: Lantern Shield
LanternShield.flavorText: A versatile shield with a retractable blade and a built-in lantern, perfect for combat and exploring shadowy realms.

Lantern.name: Lantern
Lantern.flavorText: A lantern useful for lighting up dark paths, enabling for quicker traversal.

LargeScroll.name: Ancient Scroll (Cracked)
LargeScroll.flavorText: Filled with ancient writing that may uncover the secrets of the world or might just be the recipe for old fashioned cake.

LavaGolemShoulderFragment.name: Lava Golem Shoulder Fragment
LavaGolemShoulderFragment.flavorText: It is a massive stone fragment that fell from a lava golem’s shoulder. It is far heavier than it appears, requiring considerable strength to move.

LavaMushroom.name: Lava Mushroom
LavaMushroom.flavorText: A unique mushroom found only in the Firedeep. It grows by feeding on the heat of lava zones and has the property of storing heat within its body. Dwarves dry this mushroom over a long period and enjoy it as a snack.

LavishShirt.name: Lavish Shirt
LavishShirt.flavorText: A shirt made from subtly lustrous fabric. A patterned scarf draped around it adds a touch of refined style.

LeatherBonnet.name: Leather Bonnet
LeatherBonnet.flavorText: A fancy leather hat with feathers.

LeatherBoot.name: Leather Boot
LeatherBoot.flavorText: Worn leather boot weathered by years of sea wind and salt. The surface is cracked and damaged in many places.

LeatherCap.name: Leather Cap
LeatherCap.flavorText: Doubled layered leather cap with reinforced stitching.

LeatherChausses.name: Leather Chausses
LeatherChausses.flavorText: Leather pants that provide flexible protection effective against slashing weapons.

LeatherGloves.name: Leather Gloves
LeatherGloves.flavorText: Good quality leather with double stitching for reinforcement, nice and snug.

LeatherLamellar.name: Leather Lamellar
LeatherLamellar.flavorText: Crafted from interlaced leather plates, its scale-like structure offers both protection and flexibility.

LeatherLeggings.name: Leather Leggings
LeatherLeggings.flavorText: Crafted using rough leathers, shaped and sewn to fit the body comfortably.

Lifeleaf.name: Lifeleaf
Lifeleaf.flavorText: Valued for its life-bestowing qualities acquired from soil soaked in blood.

LightAketon.name: Light Aketon
LightAketon.flavorText: Crafted from fabrics and reinforced with strategic padding, providing optimal balance between defense and agility.

LightBringer.name: Light Bringer
LightBringer.flavorText: Those of faith know how to combat darkness.

LightCassock.name: Light Cassock
LightCassock.flavorText: A plain cassock worn by ordinary clergy and monks. Made from coarse, light-colored fabric, it conveys a sense of humility and simplicity.

LightGauntlets.name: Light Gauntlets
LightGauntlets.flavorText: Forged from lightweight alloys, offer exceptional hand protection.

LightfootBoots.name: Lightfoot Boots
LightfootBoots.flavorText: Made with light durable leather, allowing one to move swiftly through a variety of obstacles.

Lock.name: Lock
Lock.flavorText: A large, heavy padlock. It looks like it could be used if the right key is found.

Lockpick.name: Lockpick
Lockpick.flavorText: Lockpicks are versatile tools, capable of opening a wide variety of locks.

LongPipe.name: Long Pipe
LongPipe.flavorText: A long slender smoking pipe. Burn marks remain at the tip.

Longbow.name: Longbow
Longbow.flavorText: Carved from yew wood with reinforced leather binds for steady gripping. It strikes from long distances with accuracy.

Longsword.name: Longsword
Longsword.flavorText: A very long blade crafted from durable metal with a staunch hilt, heavy yet still feels nimble in your grasp.

LooseTrousers.name: Loose Trousers
LooseTrousers.flavorText: Extremely light, soft breathable canvas cotton trousers.

LowBoots.name: Low Boots
LowBoots.flavorText: Featuring reinforced seams and double-stitched panels for enhanced durability.

Small.name: Potion of Luck
Small.flavorText: A potion said to bring good luck when drunk. The origin of the contents is unknown.

Large.name: Great Potion of Luck
Large.flavorText: A potion said to bring good luck when drunk. The origin of the contents is unknown.

LukewarmStew.name: Lukewarm Stew
LukewarmStew.flavorText: A half-eaten bowl of stew. It still holds a faint lukewarm heat.

Lute.name: Lute
Lute.flavorText: A bard's trusty Lute, capable of soothing savage beasts with enchanting melodies.

LuxuryBootRack.name: Luxury Boot Rack
LuxuryBootRack.flavorText: A sturdy boot tree made of solid wood. It helps maintain the shape of boots, preventing creases and damage.

Lyre.name: Lyre
Lyre.flavorText: The frame is made of finely polished maple wood and the strings are woven from strong silk.

Maggots.name: Maggots
Maggots.flavorText: Tiny creatures, tirelessly recycling the remnants of the fallen.

MagicProtectionPotion.name: Magic Protection Potion
MagicProtectionPotion.flavorText: An effective potion to help aid against magical threats.

MagmaEssence.name: Magma Essence
MagmaEssence.flavorText: An essence obtained from lava slimes. It takes the form of a thick liquid and bubbles with heat like magma.

ManaSphere.name: Mana Sphere
ManaSphere.flavorText: Crafted with mana flakes allowing the currents of magic to flow more freely.

ManuscriptsoftheWarlord.name: Manuscripts of the Warlord
ManuscriptsoftheWarlord.flavorText: Manuscripts of the Warlord: The legacy of the Skeleton Warlord, once a stalwart defender who watched his king succumb to darkness. Now bound as a spectral guardian, he eternally protects and commands the secrets and lingering spirits within the castle’s forsaken walls—a testament to loyalty and the corrosive power of sinister magic.

MarauderOutfit.name: Marauder Outfit
MarauderOutfit.flavorText: A mix of soft padding for comfort, leather for movability and plate armor for added protection.

MeltedPickaxeHead.name: Melted Pickaxe Head
MeltedPickaxeHead.flavorText: A pickaxe head warped by extreme heat. The handle is gone and only the partially melted head remains.

MercurialCloak.name: Mercurial Cloak
MercurialCloak.flavorText: This cloak's deep navy shade allows one to easily vanish into the shadows, a perfect companion for the stealthy and mysterious.

MermaidScale.name: Mermaid Scale
MermaidScale.flavorText: This scale, taken from the body of a dead mermaid, shimmers beautifully in many colors when it catches the light. Yet the cold aura clinging to it leaves an unsettling chill in the air.

MermaidsTear.name: Mermaid's Tear
MermaidsTear.flavorText: This teardrop-shaped, milky-white crystal is usually translucent but turns clear underwater. Some claim it can be taken from a living mermaid, yet most are found on the dead.

MetalCup.name: Goblet (Cracked)
MetalCup.flavorText: Has value as long as it can hold a pint of ale.

MidnightStagDisplay.name: Head of the Midnight Stag
MidnightStagDisplay.flavorText: This head carries a dark and ominous aura. The hollow eyes of the stag devoid of light cast a somber shadow around it.

MimicTooth.name: Mimic Tooth
MimicTooth.flavorText: The jagged incisor of a mimic, a twisted reminder of its ability to transform and ensnare unsuspecting adventurers.

Mitre.name: Mitre
Mitre.flavorText: A hat worn by high clergy, adorned with gilded leather and amethysts that enhance its splendor.

MoldyBread.name: Moldy Bread
MoldyBread.flavorText: A bread with a flourishing ecosystem of molds and fungi, a questionable delicacy for adventurous eaters.

MonkeyPendant.name: Monkey Pendant
MonkeyPendant.flavorText: This pendant offers a boost in dexterity, ideal for tasks requiring precision and quick reflexes.

MorningStar.name: Morning Star
MorningStar.flavorText: Heavy to the hand, the sharpened spikes of this morningstar are perfect for bludgeoning attacks.

MysteriousPotion.name: Mysterious Potion
MysteriousPotion.flavorText: Its purpose is unclear, and it’s best not to drink it without knowing what it does.

MysticGloves.name: Mystic Gloves
MysticGloves.flavorText: Delicate and adorned with intricate designs, allowing spellcasters to maintain precise control over their magical energies.

MysticVestments.name: Mystic Vestments
MysticVestments.flavorText: Perfect attire for any mystic, cozy and functional, all while maintaining the mysterious vibe.

MysticalGem.name: Mystical Gem
MysticalGem.flavorText: A beautiful jewel that shines mysteriously. There are elaborate parts that seem to fit somewhere.

NavigationalCompass.name: Navigational Compass
NavigationalCompass.flavorText: A compass that shows direction anywhere. The red-painted metal needle always points north.

NecklaceOfPeace.name: Necklace of Peace
NecklaceOfPeace.flavorText: Infused with a tranquil energy, increases your maximum health.

NormanNasalHelm.name: Norman Nasal Helm
NormanNasalHelm.flavorText: Crafted with a distinctive nasal guard, this helm allows for better airflow, keeping you cool and collected during intense combat.

NorthernFullTunic.name: Northern Full Tunic
NorthernFullTunic.flavorText: When functionality meets comfort you get a soft tunic with closely weaved chainmail vest on top.

NorthernHalfTunic.name: Northern Half Tunic
NorthernHalfTunic.flavorText: Woven from wool, with an added layer of chain mail protection, maintaining a comfortable and breathable feel.

ObsidianIngots.name: Obsidian Ingot
ObsidianIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure obsidian.

ObsidianOres.name: Obsidian Ore
ObsidianOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock bearing traces of glassy dark-violet obsidian.

ObsidianPowder.name: Obsidian Powder
ObsidianPowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding obsidian ore.

OccultistBoots.name: Occultist Boots
OccultistBoots.flavorText: Crafted from supple yet durable materials, always a comfortable fit.

OccultistHood.name: Occultist Hood
OccultistHood.flavorText: This hood is revered among practitioners of the mystic arts for its exceptional discreet allure.

OccultistPants.name: Occultist Pants
OccultistPants.flavorText: Tailored with precision, offering a comfortable yet form-fitting silhouette.

OccultistRobe.name: Occultist Robe
OccultistRobe.flavorText: A bewitching garment that weaves together style and sorcery.

OccultistTunic.name: Occultist Tunic
OccultistTunic.flavorText: A garment woven with dark materials and fabrics, a top choice for rituals.

OilLantern.name: Oil Lantern
OilLantern.flavorText: Always reliable, the oil lantern casts a warm glow illuminating the path ahead.

OldBloodyBandage.name: Old Bloody Bandage
OldBloodyBandage.flavorText: Cursed mummy's eternal entombment, stained with unknown splotches of blood.

OldCloth.name: Old Cloth
OldCloth.flavorText: Worn piece of fabric, its threads unraveling with age.

OldNauticalChartFragment.name: Old Nautical Chart Fragment
OldNauticalChartFragment.flavorText: A torn fragment of an old nautical chart. Worn and frayed, but if the remaining pieces are found and fitted together, its contents might be revealed.

OldRope.name: Old Rope
OldRope.flavorText: An old rope that has been left unattended for a long time. Some strands are frayed, but with a bit of care, it could still be useful.

OldRustyKey.name: Old Rusty Key
OldRustyKey.flavorText: A rusty old key that doubts whether it will open the door.

OldShoes.name: Old Shoes
OldShoes.flavorText: If the shoe fits wear it, unless it stinks... Then you should probably wash it before putting it on.

OnyxGloves.name: Onyx Gloves
OnyxGloves.flavorText: Leather gloves of pitch-black shade. They fit tightly to the fingers, without hindering movement.

OpenSallet.name: Open Sallet
OpenSallet.flavorText: The sturdy construction of this helm ensures reliable defense against both direct and glancing blows.

OracleRobe.name: Oracle Robe
OracleRobe.flavorText: Layers of light delicate fabrics, some dyed others embordered with intricate gold designs, wrapped in a silk sash.

OrnateJazerant.name: Ornate Jazerant
OrnateJazerant.flavorText: Crafted consisting of chain mail between layers of fabric or leather, designed to add protection against slashing and piercing attacks.

OwlPendant.name: Owl Pendant
OwlPendant.flavorText: Enhancing the ability to cast more diverse and powerful spells.

OxPendant.name: Ox Pendant
OxPendant.flavorText: Invoke the power of the Ox, improving the wearer's strength.

PaddedLeggings.name: Padded Leggings
PaddedLeggings.flavorText: A little protection is better than no protection.

PaddedTunic.name: Padded Tunic
PaddedTunic.flavorText: Made from quilting wool, offering padded layers of protection. The flexible soft armor allows for mobility with ease.

Paperweight.name: Paperweight
Paperweight.flavorText: A paperweight with a silver base adorned with glass beads. When touched by light, the beads shimmer and a beautiful halo spreads across the page.

PastoralTunic.name: Pastoral Tunic
PastoralTunic.flavorText: A tunic made from coarse yet sturdy fabric. Its simplicity grants comfort and freedom of movement.

Pavise.name: Pavise
Pavise.flavorText: An extremely large shield with a prominent ridge crafted in it's center, offering maximum protection.

PearlNecklace.name: Pearl Necklace (Cracked)
PearlNecklace.flavorText: A stylish necklace made from using rare snow pearls harvested from the depths of the ocean.

Pebble.name: Pebble
Pebble.flavorText: A smooth flat stone that's easily found on the ground.

PhantomFlower.name: Phantom Flower
PhantomFlower.flavorText: It is said these flowers sprout in places where spirits are active.

PhoenixChoker.name: Phoenix Choker
PhoenixChoker.flavorText: An intricate leather choker to symbolize rebirth and renewal.

Pickaxe.name: Pickaxe
Pickaxe.flavorText: A trusty iron pickaxe that can chip away at most ore.

Pigache.name: Pigache
Pigache.flavorText: Shoes with sharply pointed toes, crafted from supple leather that comfortably wraps around the instep.

Pincushion.name: Pincushion
Pincushion.flavorText: A small cushion holding needles of various sizes, kept ready for tailoring work.

PlateBoots.name: Plate Boots
PlateBoots.flavorText: Provides heavy physical protection, but definitely harder to sneak around in.

PlatePants.name: Plate Pants
PlatePants.flavorText: Extremely heavy, compromising speed for extra protection.

Plunderhosen.name: Plunderhosen
Plunderhosen.flavorText: Patterned fabric trousers with decorative slashes. Their puffed thighs give them a noble look.

PocketWatch.name: Pocket Watch
PocketWatch.flavorText: A round spring-driven watch made of metal. Compact and easy to carry but its exposed face makes it vulnerable to even minor impacts.

PoisonVial.name: Poison Vial
PoisonVial.flavorText: It is said to contain a blend of toxins from the deadliest beasts in the realm. When broken, this vial releases a poisonous fog that lingers in the air, draining the life from those foolish enough to inhale it.

PotionofWaterBreathing.name: Potion of Water Breathing
PotionofWaterBreathing.flavorText: A potion that allows you to stay underwater for long periods without running out of breath.

Poupoint.name: Pourpoint
Poupoint.flavorText: A padded doublet design to help absorb impact and provide added defense with adjustable straps.

PrimitiveBracelet.name: Primitive Bracelet
PrimitiveBracelet.flavorText: A simple adornment crafted from raw materials, its crude design belies the skill of its maker.

ProtectionPotion.name: Potion of Protection
ProtectionPotion.flavorText: Potion that gives a temporary defensive shield around the user.

ProwlerGloves.name: Prowler Gloves
ProwlerGloves.flavorText: Leather gloves made for those who seek stealthy movement. Light and flexible, they minimize sound.

Quarterstaff.name: Quarterstaff
Quarterstaff.flavorText: Crafted from hardwood, this long shaft is a traditional and reliable weapon and tool.

Quiver.name: Quiver
Quiver.flavorText: A roughly crafted leather quiver. It can carry a large number of arrows.

RadiantCloak.name: Radiant Cloak
RadiantCloak.flavorText: A formal cloak that shows off the elegance of the wearer.

RangerHood.name: Ranger Hood
RangerHood.flavorText: Lightweight and breathable, cut to hug the head and protect from the elements.

Rapier.name: Rapier
