Rapier.flavorText: A slender but sharp blade crafted with a protective hand guard. Effective at both cutting and thrusting.

RatPendant.name: Rat Pendant
RatPendant.flavorText: Adapt and utilize your surroundings more effectively, just like the clever rat.

RawhideGloves.name: Rawhide Gloves
RawhideGloves.flavorText: Buttery soft lambskin leather, toasty warm all while leaving no fingerprints behind.

RecurveBow.name: Recurve Bow
RecurveBow.flavorText: Crafted with bends, striking a balance between speed and accuracy, capable of dispatching enemies from afar.

RedApple.name: Red Apple
RedApple.flavorText: A fresh red apple with a vibrant hue. It looks sweet.

RegalGambeson.name: Regal Gambeson
RegalGambeson.flavorText: Beautifully dyed quilting wool with smooth leather straps ensuring a good fit.

RegalMitre.name: Regal Mitre
RegalMitre.flavorText: A mitre reserved for the highest clergy. Dyed deep crimson leather and long decorative bands at its sides reveal the wearer’s supreme authority and sacred presence.

ReinforcedGloves.name: Reinforced Gloves
ReinforcedGloves.flavorText: Made with thick yet flexible hide. Adjustable wrist bracing offering extra support and reinforcement.

Reins.name: Reins
Reins.flavorText: Crude reins cut from rope. Easy to obtain, but vulnerable to moisture and unsuitable for long use.

RingOfCourage.name: Ring of Courage
RingOfCourage.flavorText: Imbued with the essence of bravery, enhancing your strength.

RingOfFinesse.name: Ring of Finesse
RingOfFinesse.flavorText: Enhancing your ability to execute maneuvers with more ease.

RingOfQuickness.name: Ring of Quickness
RingOfQuickness.flavorText: Subtly increases your movements to be more swift and fluid.

RingOfResolve.name: Ring of Resolve
RingOfResolve.flavorText: Empowering you to remain resolute and focused.

RingOfSurvival.name: Ring of Survival
RingOfSurvival.flavorText: Adapt and thrive in various environments.

RingOfVitality.name: Ring of Vitality
RingOfVitality.flavorText: Pulsing with life force, subtly enhances your vigor.

RingOfWisdom.name: Ring of Wisdom
RingOfWisdom.flavorText: Enabling the knowledge of more complex spell casting.

RitualRobe.name: Ritual Robe
RitualRobe.flavorText: This robe, designed for the guardians of nature, is made from organic materials.

RivetedGloves.name: Riveted Gloves
RivetedGloves.flavorText: Gloves lined with the softest mink fur, reinforced leather with wrist bracing to ensure a steady grip.

RobeofDarkness.name: Robe of Darkness
RobeofDarkness.flavorText: An oracle robe crafted using enchanted materials tainted with darkness.

RodOfRighteousness.name: Rod of Righteousness
RodOfRighteousness.flavorText: Designed for functionality, the silver integration in this mace subtly improves its performance against undead beings.

RogueCowl.name: Rogue Cowl
RogueCowl.flavorText: Crafted with dark fabrics helping you blend into your environment with ease.

RondelDagger.name: Rondel Dagger
RondelDagger.flavorText: An elegant weapon with one of the sharpest points that can pierce even the most sturdy armor.

RottenFluids.name: Rotten Fluids
RottenFluids.flavorText: A viscous fluid extracted from rotting matter, emitting a sickening odor.

RottenLump.name: Rotten Lump
RottenLump.flavorText: A chunk of flesh torn from the body of an Abomination. Pus and rotting matter are tangled together, leaving its shape barely intact.

RoundShield.name: Round Shield
RoundShield.flavorText: A medium sized round wooden shield with leather accents, versatile and impactful in the users hand.

RubysilverHalberd.name: Rubysilver Halberd
RubysilverHalberd.flavorText: A halberd forged from refined rubysilver ingots. Its fiercely honed crimson blade never loses its original hue, no matter how much blood stains it.

Hood.name: Rubysilver Hood
Hood.flavorText: A hood cut from red fabric made with Rubysilver.

RubysilverIngots.name: Rubysilver Ingot
RubysilverIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure Rubysilver.

RubysilverOres.name: Rubysilver Ore
RubysilverOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock containing traces of rubysilver.

RubysilverPowder.name: Rubysilver Powder
RubysilverPowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding ruby​​silver ore.

RuggedBoots.name: Rugged Boots
RuggedBoots.flavorText: Crafted with thick leather and lined with warm compact fur.

RunestoneGloves.name: Runestone Gloves
RunestoneGloves.flavorText: Smooth runes on these gloves create a subtle, yet captivating style.

RusticTunic.name: Rustic Tunic
RusticTunic.flavorText: A tunic made from coarse fabric. Though without adornments, it is practical and often worn by farmers and travelers in daily life.

RustyBrokenSword.name: Rusty Broken Sword
RustyBrokenSword.flavorText: A worn and broken sword, its rusted hilt and fractured blade tell tales of battles long past.

Saddle.name: Saddle
Saddle.flavorText: A leather saddle long left to fade with time. Though its color has worn away, the delicate engravings suggest it once belonged to a noble or a knight.

SailorsJournal.name: Sailor's Journal
SailorsJournal.flavorText: The paper is wrinkled as if it had been soaked and dried, but the contents remain legible. It's filled with rumors about sea routes and notes from various sailors.

Sallet.name: Sallet
Sallet.flavorText: Crafted with a distinctive curved design, providing excellent head coverage without hindering vision or mobility.

Saltvine.name: Saltvine
Saltvine.flavorText: A pale green marine plant that grows only near the Blue Maelstrom. It is a staple food for the Reeflings, but its high salinity makes it difficult for humans to consume. The Tidewalkers also use it as medicine or in rituals.

Scabbard.name: Scabbard
Scabbard.flavorText: A scabbard used to store a sword. It protects the blade and allows for safe carrying.

ScaledArmor.name: Scaled Armor
ScaledArmor.flavorText: Crafted with overlapping metal scales, it provides exceptional defense without compromising mobility, ideal for agile warriors seeking both protection and flexibility.

ScrollofFadedShadows.name: Scroll of Faded Shadows
ScrollofFadedShadows.flavorText: A scroll bound with tarnished silver thread. Its outer surface is clean, but within, the text appears deliberately obscured, as if ink had been spilled to hide what once was written. Flakes of old ink litter the parchment, leaving it stained and unclean.

ScrollofForgottenKnowledge.name: Scroll of Forgotten Knowledge
ScrollofForgottenKnowledge.flavorText: Though countless years have passed, the scroll remains perfectly preserved, its form untouched by time. A strange chill creeps over the one who holds it, as if the past itself were still watching.

ScrollofLostNames.name: Scroll of Lost Names
ScrollofLostNames.flavorText: A scroll that once bore the names of many. Most of the ink has faded beyond recognition. Faint traces remain, lines drawn through where the names once were, as if to erase them from the world.

ScrollofSealedCurse.name: Scroll of Sealed Curse
ScrollofSealedCurse.flavorText: A scroll inscribed with dark crimson script that shimmers with an unnatural glow. Upon closer inspection, it becomes clear the writing is not ink, but dried blood. At times, while gazing upon the faded text, faint whispers can be heard with no clear source.

ScrollofVanishedMemories.name: Scroll of Vanished Memories
ScrollofVanishedMemories.flavorText: A scroll worn thin by the passage of time. Its parchment is cracked and brittle in many places, as if the slightest touch might tear it apart.

SealedLetter.name: Sealed Letter
SealedLetter.flavorText: An unnamed letter, sealed with wax. Its contents remain hidden within.

SearedHide.name: Seared Hide
SearedHide.flavorText: A hide stripped from a back where flames once surged. Its fire-scorched surface is extremely rough and hardened, making it resistant to intense heat.

Seashell.name: Seashell
Seashell.flavorText: The remains of a dead clam. If you're lucky, you might find a pearl inside its shell.

SeaweedNecklace.name: Seaweed Necklace
SeaweedNecklace.flavorText: An ornament worn around the neck by a Tidewalker. Woven from various types of seaweed with intricate care, the necklace carries a faint shamanic aura.

Shackles.name: Shackles
Shackles.flavorText: An old set of shackles. The surface is rough and corroded with age.

ShadowHood.name: Shadow Hood
ShadowHood.flavorText: A hood worn by those who hide in the shadows.

ShadowMask.name: Shadow Mask
ShadowMask.flavorText: A mask that can make you look like a villain.

SharpSeaUrchinSpine.name: Sharp Sea Urchin Spine
SharpSeaUrchinSpine.flavorText: A spine taken from a sea urchin. Thin yet remarkably sharp, it can pierce even tough leather.

Shining.name: Shining Pearl
Shining.flavorText: A rare pearl found in giant clams. Unlike ordinary pearls, it emits its own light, illuminating the dark depths of the sea.

ShipsWheel.name: Ship's Wheel
ShipsWheel.flavorText: A steering wheel used to guide a ship’s course. Its handles are worn smooth, bearing the marks of countless voyages.

ShoesofDarkness.name: Shoes of Darkness
ShoesofDarkness.flavorText: Crafted with rare fabric, carrying the complex patina of darkness and power.

ShortSwordOfRighteousness.name: Short Sword of Righteousness
ShortSwordOfRighteousness.flavorText: A compact weapon, enhanced with a touch of silver, offering a small but significant edge in clashes with the undead.

ShortSword.name: Short Sword
ShortSword.flavorText: A short and broad blade melded to a fine point with a round pommel at it's base.

SilverChalice.name: Silver Chalice (Cracked)
SilverChalice.flavorText: A nice wine would be the perfect accomplice.

SilverCoin.name: Silver Coin
SilverCoin.flavorText: A silver coin, slightly tarnished but still holds some value.

SilverIngots.name: Silver Ingot
SilverIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure silver.

SilverOres.name: Silver Ore
SilverOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock containing traces of shimmering silver.

SilverPowder.name: Silver Powder
SilverPowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding silver ore.

SilverSkulltoken.name: Silver Skull Token
SilverSkulltoken.flavorText: A skull token forged of timeless silver, stained by tales of adventures long past.

SkinnyFinger.name: Skinny Finger
SkinnyFinger.flavorText: A finger withered to the point where no flesh remains. At its tip, a sharp nail has grown long and jagged.

SkullKey.name: Skull Key
SkullKey.flavorText: A mysterious key with an ominous skull embedded in it's core.

SleekHidePants.name: Sleek Hide Pants
SleekHidePants.flavorText: Crafted from thin yet sturdy leather, their surface has been treated with oils to achieve a faint, glossy sheen.

SlingStone.name: Sling Stone
SlingStone.flavorText: A small, hard stone that has been smoothed into a rounded shape.

Sling.name: Sling
Sling.flavorText: A weapon that hurls stones from a small pouch strung between leather cords. Simple in design, yet difficult to master without skill.

SmellyVomit.name: Smelly Vomit
SmellyVomit.flavorText: It is the vomit of an Abomination, reeking more foully than the rotted entrails of a long-dead beast.

SmokyPoisonPowder.name: Smoky Poison Powder
SmokyPoisonPowder.flavorText: A green powder scattered from the wings of a Demon Fly. Infused with potent toxicity, its fine particles spread easily through the air.

Soap.name: Soap
Soap.flavorText: Made from animal fat and ash. It doesn't smell pleasant, but it still gets the job done.

SootyBeardHair.name: Sooty Beard Hair
SootyBeardHair.flavorText: A dwarf’s beard, dirtied and tangled with soot. Wire-stiff to the touch with a heavy smell of metal clinging to it.

SoulHeart.name: Soul Heart
SoulHeart.flavorText: Glowing blue soul heart of a fallen adventurer.

SoulTorq.name: Torq of Soul
SoulTorq.flavorText: A beautiful solid silver necklace with an enchanting turquoise stone.

SovereignsGhostblade.name: Sovereign's Ghostblade
SovereignsGhostblade.flavorText: Its translucent blade dances with the shadows of fallen warriors, each strike evoking memories of its former glory and the commanding presence of its previous owner.

Spangenhelm.name: Spangenhelm
Spangenhelm.flavorText: Features a distinctive construction of overlapping metal plates for enhanced protection.

Spear.name: Spear
Spear.flavorText: Constructed by melding a piercing metal tip to a strong wooden pole, giving it a long deadly reach.

SpearofRot.name: Spear of Rot
SpearofRot.flavorText: Spear imbued with the rotting essence of the fallen, carrying the stench of decay.

SpectralBlade.name: Spectral Blade
SpectralBlade.flavorText: A newly forged blade crafted upon the hilt of a loyal guardian’s sword. A cold aura shimmers along the center of the blade, and it is said that those who wield it for long begin to hear faint, unknown whispers.

SpectralCloak.name: Spectral Cloak
SpectralCloak.flavorText: A cloak woven from the hem of a Spectral Knight’s garment and fabric imbued with magic. The torn parts return to their original state no matter how many times they are patched, making repairs impossible. Though it appears worn, a cold magical energy flows along the cloak’s weave.

SpectralCoinbag.name: Spectral Coinbag
SpectralCoinbag.flavorText: This isn't your typical bag. The inclusion of spectral fabric, a rare material that straddles both realms, gives it a capacity that defies mortal understanding.

SpectralFabric.name: Spectral Fabric
SpectralFabric.flavorText: This fabric shimmers with an ethereal sheen, holding the chill of the netherworld within its threads.

SpectralHilt.name: Spectral Hilt
SpectralHilt.flavorText: Once wielded by a guardian whose allegiance transcended mortality, this hilt resonates with echoes of undying loyalty. Its cold touch is a solemn reminder of a pact sealed beyond the veil of death.

Spellbook.name: Spellbook
Spellbook.flavorText: Crafted from engraved leather bindings and pages etched with magical ancient runes and markings.

SpellplunderRod.name: Spellplunder Rod
SpellplunderRod.flavorText: The final project of a sorcerer who vanished under mysterious circumstances. Imbued with forbidden magic, it not only steals spells but also echoes with the anguish of those whose magic it has seized, a grim companion thirsting for arcane power.

SpentCandle.name: Spent Candle
SpentCandle.flavorText: A candle with a short wick and hardened wax clinging to its sides. It still looks usable, but barely.

SpikedGauntlet.name: Spiked Gauntlet
SpikedGauntlet.flavorText: A heavy metal gauntlet lined with sharp spikes, intimidating enough to make onlookers flinch. The spikes running from the back of the hand to the forearm are not mere decoration, but meant to deal real damage in combat. As much a weapon as it is armor, this gauntlet must be worn with care. A single misstep can injure the wearer just as easily as the enemy.

SplendidCloak.name: Splendid Cloak
SplendidCloak.flavorText: A splendid cloak tinged with red that seemed to move at any moment.

SquareCushion.name: Square Cushion
SquareCushion.flavorText: A well-used square cushion. With some fresh stuffing, it might still be usable.

StaffOfRighteousness.name: Staff of Righteousness
StaffOfRighteousness.flavorText: A well-crafted staff, its balanced weight and sturdy construction make it a reliable companion for any encounter.

StaffofGluttony.name: Staff of Gluttony
StaffofGluttony.flavorText: Forged from the antlers of a wendigo, this staff devours the life force of those it touches, hungering eternally for more.

Starfish.name: Starfish
Starfish.flavorText: A marine creature that inhabits the sea. Commonly found in shallow coastal waters, among reefs, or along sandy seabeds.

StefanBeret.name: Stefan Beret
StefanBeret.flavorText: A decorative hat for a bard’s performance. Embellished with embroidery and feathers, it radiates an old-fashioned elegance as its rich folds cascade gracefully to the back.

SterlingAxe.name: Sterling Axe
SterlingAxe.flavorText: A two-handed axe forged of silver, powerful against undead foes.

SterlingBlade.name: Sterling Blade
SterlingBlade.flavorText: A two-handed blade melded with sterling silver, used to combat the undead.

SterlingBow.name: Sterling Bow
SterlingBow.flavorText: A sturdy bow made of sterling silver, deftly piercing undead foes.

SterlingDagger.name: Sterling Dagger
SterlingDagger.flavorText: A sharp dagger intricately forged with silver, shaped to puncture undead enemies.

SterlingRod.name: Sterling Rod
SterlingRod.flavorText: A compact mace made of sterling silver, designed for undead slaying.

SterlingShortSword.name: Sterling Short Sword
SterlingShortSword.flavorText: A solid silver short sword, crafted to swiftly eliminate undead.

SterlingStaff.name: Sterling Staff
SterlingStaff.flavorText: A staff fused with sterling silver, melded to combat the undead. A silent threat to any undead that dare approach.

StickyTongue.name: Sticky Tongue
StickyTongue.flavorText: A tongue cut from the slobber-soaked maw of a Cerberus. Its damp, slippery texture evokes a strong sense of disgust.

StilettoDagger.name: Stiletto Dagger
StilettoDagger.flavorText: A slim and subtle assassination weapon with a thick, sturdy hilt that allows for masterful combat techniques.

StillmendBoots.name: Stillmend Boots
StillmendBoots.flavorText: Crafted from the hide of the mythical Earthwalker, these boots carry the creature's regenerative magic. They mend wounds with the stillness of ancient magic, restoring vitality with each rooted pause.

Stirrups.name: Stirrups
Stirrups.flavorText: A stirrup simply made from rope and an iron ring. Light in weight yet flimsy, lacking in sturdiness.

StitchedTurnshoe.name: Stitched Turnshoe
StitchedTurnshoe.flavorText: Designed with superior flexibility and comfort, allowing for swift and agile movements on any terrain.

StoneFragment.name: Stone Fragment
StoneFragment.flavorText: A small piece that broke off from a larger, shattered stone.

StoneMortar.name: Stone Mortar
StoneMortar.flavorText: A compact stone mortar used to grind herbs, minerals, and other materials into fine powder.

StrawHat.name: Straw Hat
StrawHat.flavorText: A straw hat that a certain farmer often wore.

StuddedLeather.name: Studded Leather
StuddedLeather.flavorText: Armor with a network of metal studs meticulously embedded into supple leather, offering reliable defense without sacrificing mobility or comfort.

StuddedWyvernLeather.name: Studded Wyvern Leather
StuddedWyvernLeather.flavorText: Expertly stitched together using a frost-encrusted hide combined with rare pelts for extra comfort.

SturdyBoots.name: Sturdy Boots
SturdyBoots.flavorText: Boots made of thick leather. Though coarse in appearance, their durability keeps them from wearing out easily.

SturdyCloth.name: Sturdy Cloth
SturdyCloth.flavorText: A tightly woven fabric made with thick thread. Its sturdy texture makes it suitable for various uses.

SturdyLog.name: Sturdy Log
SturdyLog.flavorText: A large high quality log cut from a tree.

SturdyRope.name: Sturdy Rope
SturdyRope.flavorText: A thick rope tightly woven from coarse fibers. Strong and durable, it won’t break easily.

SulfurSaliva.name: Sulfur Saliva
SulfurSaliva.flavorText: It is a sticky saliva that gives off a strong sulfurous odor. Highly flammable, it can easily catch fire and should be handled with care.

SunburstOrb.name: Sunburst Orb
SunburstOrb.flavorText: Originally crafted to aid the Light Bringers in their sacred mission, this orb exposes those who slither in the shadows, preventing them from finding sanctuary in darkness.

SurgicalKit.name: Surgical Kit
SurgicalKit.flavorText: A medical kit used to dress serious wounds.

SurvivalBow.name: Survival Bow
SurvivalBow.flavorText: This fast and lightweight wooden bow was improvised by adventurers for survival.

TailOfCentaur.name: Centaur Tail
TailOfCentaur.flavorText: A wicked extension from a centaur demon that is treasured.

TanglethreadTrousers.name: Tanglethread Trousers
TanglethreadTrousers.flavorText: Crafted by a renowned tailor, commissioned by beings of both shadow and light, these trousers rank among his most coveted creations. Highly prized by collectors and adventurers alike, they feature a unique thread pattern—his signature, marking the work of a tailor with unparalleled skill.

Tar.name: Tar
Tar.flavorText: A thick, black, sticky liquid. A staple for sailors, it is used to waterproof and repair ships. Highly flammable, it must be handled with care.

TatteredChoker.name: Tattered Choker
TatteredChoker.flavorText: A crude choker made by tying together scraps of leather and worn bandages. There is no sign of proper tailoring, and its shape is rough and awkward. It barely deserves to be called a choker, yet it holds a faint but undeniable magical presence.

TatteredCloak.name: Tattered Cloak
TatteredCloak.flavorText: A cloak worn out after many adventures, but familiar to the body.

TearoftheVolcano.name: Tear of the Volcano
TearoftheVolcano.flavorText: A gemstone formed when the hottest magma that once drove the colossus’s heart crystallized. It holds pure fire energy.

Telescope.name: Telescope
Telescope.flavorText: A folding telescope made of metal. Easy to carry and commonly used by sailors.

TemplarArmor.name: Templar Armor
TemplarArmor.flavorText: A brilliant blend of plate and cloth armor, helping to protect against physical and magic attacks.

ThickForefoot.name: Thick Forefoot
ThickForefoot.flavorText: A forefoot lined with rock-hard muscle and menacing claws. Its sheer weight can be felt just by holding it.

ThornShield.name: Thorn Shield
ThornShield.flavorText: Forged in the heart of a cursed thicket where the blood of a fallen hero was spilled, this shield harbors his vengeful spirit, eager to right ancient wrongs with every calculated parry.

ThrowingKnife.name: Throwing Knife
ThrowingKnife.flavorText: Meticulously crafted sharp knives that can be thrown from a distance and pierce through even plate armor.

TidalArcaneGloves.name: Tidal Arcane Gloves
TidalArcaneGloves.flavorText: Gloves crafted with added essence of Tidestone. They enhance the wearer’s spell power but are vulnerable to heat and can be easily damaged by fire.

TidalButtonedBoots.name: Tidal Buttoned Boots
TidalButtonedBoots.flavorText: Boots distinguished by finely crafted Tidestone buttons. They wrap the ankles firmly, highlighting a sleek and stylish line.

TidalCloak.name: Tidal Cloak
TidalCloak.flavorText: This cloak woven with Tidestone powder bears subtle wave-like patterns. Underwater it moves with the flow and does not hinder the wearer’s movements.

TidalCoif.name: Tidal Coif
TidalCoif.flavorText: A coif woven with powdered Tidestone. It bears a soft teal hue, allowing the wearer to retain clarity even in the depths of the sea.

TidalCrystalBall.name: Tidal Crystal Ball
TidalCrystalBall.flavorText: A crystal orb refined from Tidestone. When used the orb swirls with wave-like currents of energy enhancing the caster’s focus.

TidalElkwoodCrown.name: Tidal Elkwood Crown
TidalElkwoodCrown.flavorText: A crown of sturdy leather infused with the spirit of the sea. Its delicate Tidestone horn adornments shine with a blue, watery light.

TidalElkwoodGloves.name: Tidal Elkwood Gloves
TidalElkwoodGloves.flavorText: Vambraces reinforced with rivets sharply cut from Tidestone. Underwater, the rivets blend with the surrounding hues, yet glimmer softly like fish scales when touched by light.

TidalFalchion.name: Tidal Falchion
TidalFalchion.flavorText: A falchion forged from sharply honed Tidestone. Its weight remains substantial, yet it moves more smoothly underwater. The broad teal blade shimmers with an iridescent glow whenever it catches the light.

TidalJesterCap.name: Tidal Jester Cap
TidalJesterCap.flavorText: A whimsical jester’s cap. The Tidestone beads at the tips of its horns shimmer with a gentle light even beneath the water.

TidalKrisDagger.name: Tidal Kris Dagger
TidalKrisDagger.flavorText: A kris dagger forged from refined Tidestone. The pale teal blade bears the stone’s distinctive wave patterns and its color lightens underwater making it hard to notice.

TidalLightGauntlets.name: Tidal Light Gauntlets
TidalLightGauntlets.flavorText: Gauntlets crafted from a lightweight alloy infused with Tidestone. Designed for effortless movement even underwater.

TidalOccultistBoots.name: Tidal Occultist Boots
TidalOccultistBoots.flavorText: Boots finished with a coating of Tidestone powder over sturdy fabric. With each step, a faint teal glow shimmers across their surface, evoking a sense of quiet mystique.

TidalPlateBoots.name: Tidal Plate Boots
TidalPlateBoots.flavorText: Boots forged from refined Tidestone. Their weight allows steady movement underwater, though they offer little speed.

TidalPlatePants.name: Tidal Plate Pants
TidalPlatePants.flavorText: These plate leggings forged from Tidestone possess formidable defense equal to their heavy weight and allow somewhat smoother movement underwater.

TidalProwlerGloves.name: Tidal Prowler Gloves
TidalProwlerGloves.flavorText: Leather gloves treated with Tidestone powder. They are less affected by water currents, allowing agile and precise movement even underwater.

TidalRegalGambeson.name: Tidal Regal Gambeson
TidalRegalGambeson.flavorText: This garment enhanced with Tidestone powder offers a comfortable fit along with excellent water resistance and keeps the wearer comfortable even when wet.

TidalScaledArmor.name: Tidal Scaled Armor
TidalScaledArmor.flavorText: This armor made from thinly forged Tidestone scales possesses sturdy defense and allows natural movement even in rough currents.

TidalSleekHidePants.name: Tidal Sleek Hide Pants
TidalSleekHidePants.flavorText: Leather pants polished with Tidestone powder. They bear a teal sheen and resist discoloration even when wet.

TidalSpangenhelm.name: Tidal Spangenhelm
TidalSpangenhelm.flavorText: A helmet crafted from layered plates forged out of refined Tidestone ingots. Faint traces of wave-like patterns remain upon its surface.

TidalSturdyBoots.name: Tidal Sturdy Boots
TidalSturdyBoots.flavorText: Boots enhanced with Tidestone powder for slight water resistance. The thick lining offers protection but adds extra weight.

TidalTimewornRobe.name: Tidal Timeworn Robe
TidalTimewornRobe.flavorText: This robe is adorned with turquoise patterns embroidered in Tidestone threads. It is sturdily crafted to withstand the passage of time without fraying.

TidalTrunkHose.name: Tidal Trunk Hose
TidalTrunkHose.flavorText: These pants made with added Tidestone powder dry quickly when wet, and their puffed silhouette naturally restores itself, providing a consistently fresh and comfortable wear.

TidalVisoredSallet.name: Tidal Visored Sallet
TidalVisoredSallet.flavorText: Forged from Tidestone, this sallet endures the roughest currents, steadfastly shielding the wearer’s head.

TidalWandererAttire.name: Tidal Wanderer Attire
TidalWandererAttire.flavorText: This worn outfit, enhanced with Tidestone powder, possesses a slight degree of water resistance.

TidestoneIngots.name: Tidestone Ingot
TidestoneIngots.flavorText: A highly enriched ingot of pure Tidestone.

TidestoneOres.name: Tidestone Ore
TidestoneOres.flavorText: A dirty chunk of rock bearing traces of Tidestone with teal wave-like patterns.

TidestonePowder.name: Tidestone Powder
TidestonePowder.flavorText: Powder made by finely grinding Tidestone ore.

TidewalkerFin.name: Tidewalker Fin
TidewalkerFin.flavorText: A fin taken from a Tidewalker’s back. Remarkably tough for its thickness, it minimizes resistance in the water, allowing swift and agile movement.

TimewornRobe.name: Timeworn Robe
TimewornRobe.flavorText: Designed to be lightweight yet resilient, grants freedom of movement and adorned with intricate patterns.

TokenOfHonor.name: Token of Honor
TokenOfHonor.flavorText: A medal awarded to the courageous warriors who have demonstrated exceptional bravery in battle.

TomeofSheol.name: Tome of Sheol
TomeofSheol.flavorText: Bound from ash of the damned and inked in demon blood, this unholy tome whispers the vile language of eternal torment.

TongueOfMimic.name: Mimic Tongue
TongueOfMimic.flavorText: A grotesque and slimy elongated tongue, taken from the maw of a mimic.

Topfhelm.name: Topfhelm
Topfhelm.flavorText: Crafted with an unconventional shape allowing for optimal ventilation, preventing overheating during intense combat.

Torch.name: Torch
Torch.flavorText: A wooden stick wrapped in a flammable substance, capable of illuminating the dark.

TornBatWing.name: Torn Bat Wing
TornBatWing.flavorText: A lightweight leathery wing, it appears to be torn.

TornSail.name: Torn Sail
TornSail.flavorText: A sail damaged by long voyages and raging storms. Its color has faded, and holes are scattered across its surface.

TracingWheel.name: Tracing Wheel
TracingWheel.flavorText: A tailoring tool used to mark even dots on fabric or leather, guiding the cutting or sewing line.

TrapDisarmingKit.name: Trap Disarming Kit
TrapDisarmingKit.flavorText: A compact kit filled with an assortment of finely crafted specialized tools that make disarming even the most complex traps seem like child's play.

TrapperHat.name: Trapper Hat
TrapperHat.flavorText: A hunter’s hat made of thick leather. With ear flaps for warmth, it protects the head during long hours outdoors.

TriPeltDoublet.name: Tri-Pelt Doublet
TriPeltDoublet.flavorText: Crafted using a combination of pelts that bridges the gap between the cunning predator and a hardy brute.

TriPeltNorthernFullTunic.name: Tri-Pelt Northern Full Tunic
TriPeltNorthernFullTunic.flavorText: Crafted from a menagerie of leathers, this tunic features pelts from creatures both mundane and rare.

Tripod.name: Tripod
Tripod.flavorText: A metal stand with three legs, used to hold small cauldrons or pots over a fire.

TrollBane.name: Troll’s Bane
TrollBane.flavorText: The blood soaked wood from the mighty Troll’s club whittled down to a manageable size and weight.

TrollBlood.name: Troll's Blood
TrollBlood.flavorText: Blood essence obtained from a Cave Troll, you will gain extraordinary healing capabilities with this!

TrollPelt.name: Troll Pelt
TrollPelt.flavorText: A massive thick pelt with an unmistakable scent.

TrollsClub.name: Troll's Club
TrollsClub.flavorText: A massive and crudely carved club, its weight and rough edges make it a devastating weapon in close-quarters combat.

TroubadourOutfit.name: Troubadour Outfit
TroubadourOutfit.flavorText: A stylish outfit that storytellers would love to wear.

TrunkHose.name: Trunk Hose
TrunkHose.flavorText: Hose padded at the thighs to create volume. Below the calves, they fit tightly to the legs without hindering movement.

Turnshoe.name: Turnshoe
Turnshoe.flavorText: Made from quality bovine hide and firm stitching. Named due to it being crafted inside out.

Twig.name: Twig
Twig.flavorText: A small branch with decent length and flexibility.

ValentineCandies.name: Heart Candy
ValentineCandies.flavorText: Say “I love you!” with every bite of these delicious sweet treats. Hard candy hearts with messages of endearment.

ValiantAttire.name: Valiant Attire
ValiantAttire.flavorText: An attire of fine silk, lavishly embroidered with intricate patterns, seamlessly joined with a polished leather vest that accentuates the wearer’s dignity.

VigilantCloak.name: Vigilant Cloak
VigilantCloak.flavorText: The vibrant blue of the cloak is believed to be the result of an ancient dyeing technique that involves sapphire crystals, worn by those of prestige.

VikingHelm.name: Viking Helm
VikingHelm.flavorText: A reliable iron helmet that transitions to thick leather pieces, overlaid with tightly knit chainmail.

VikingSword.name: Viking Sword
VikingSword.flavorText: This expertly crafted Viking sword features a sharp blade and sturdy hilt.

VisoredBarbutaHelm.name: Visored Barbuta Helm
VisoredBarbutaHelm.flavorText: The inside of this intimidating helm is lined with a soft padding to help protect against head focused attacks.

VisoredSallet.name: Visored Sallet
VisoredSallet.flavorText: With its sturdy construction and broad brim, this helm ensures your head remains safe in the heat of battle.

VoidBlade.name: Void Blade
VoidBlade.flavorText: Crafted of dark matter and ironstone, a blade beyond earthly limitations.

VolcanicAsh.name: Volcanic Ash
VolcanicAsh.flavorText: A residue left behind by granules of volcanic ash.

WalkingCane.name: Walking Cane
WalkingCane.flavorText: An old walking cane once used by a noble. The handle is adorned with a dragon's head.

WandererAttire.name: Wanderer Attire
WandererAttire.flavorText: Old clothes worn out in a long wandering life.

WanderlightLantern.name: Wanderlight Lantern
WanderlightLantern.flavorText: In a prosperous era, Toz, the loyal court wizard of the king, created these lanterns. Harnessing his growing powers, he equipped the elite guard with these beacons, aiming to protect against dangers that would otherwise remain unseen.

WantedPoster.name: Wanted Poster
WantedPoster.flavorText: A wanted poster bearing someone's face and name. It's stained and torn in places, but the details remain legible.

WarHammer.name: War Hammer
WarHammer.flavorText: Sturdy metal head with three differently shaped protrusions all useful, fastened to a sturdy wooden shaft.

WarHorn.name: War Horn
WarHorn.flavorText: A war horn carved from the hollowed horn of a bull. When blown, it produces a heavy sound that bolsters the morale of allies and strikes fear into the enemy.

WarMaul.name: War Maul
WarMaul.flavorText: Only the sturdiest wooden hilt could sustain the giant metal slab on top. The weight of this maul can be felt in every swing.

WardenOutfit.name: Warden Outfit
WardenOutfit.flavorText: Crafted with extra layers of hardened leather, supplying body and neck protection.

Wardweed.name: Wardweed
Wardweed.flavorText: It is believed that this herb only grows in soil once scorched by the searing heat of a dragon's breath.

WarlordsArmorShard.name: Warlord's Armor Shard
WarlordsArmorShard.flavorText: A shard from the legendary Warlord's battle-worn armor, a relic echoing ancient conflicts. Each fragment bears the weight of innumerable battles.

WarlordsBrokenSwordBlade.name: Warlord's Broken Sword Blade
WarlordsBrokenSwordBlade.flavorText: The legendary Warlord's riven weapon, shattered in the crucible of battle. A silent testament to the unwavering determination of its former master.

WarpedAdamantineShackles.name: Warped Adamantine Shackles
WarpedAdamantineShackles.flavorText: A massive chain link once forged by the ancient dwarves to bind the colossus. After the seal was broken, it was grotesquely warped by the colossus’s wrath.

WatchmanCloak.name: Watchman Cloak
WatchmanCloak.flavorText: This forest green cloak is often the preferred choice of those who wish to blend seamlessly with nature.

WendigoHoof.name: Wendigo's Hoof
WendigoHoof.flavorText: These are the hooves of a sturdy Wendigo as he trod the cold earth.

WendigoSharpClaws.name: Wendigo's Sharp Claws
WendigoSharpClaws.flavorText: These are the nails of Wendigo, who has slaughtered countless creatures, tearing their flesh apart.

WendigosAntlerFragment.name: Wendigo's Antler Fragment
WendigosAntlerFragment.flavorText: Wendigo's grotesquely overgrown horns bear the dried blood of countless victims.

WendigosEntrails.name: Wendigo's Entrails
WendigosEntrails.flavorText: Wendigo's guts, grotesquely exposed outside his body, reek of decay, deterioration, death, and contamination.

White.name: White Sash
White.flavorText: A pristine white sash, radiating an air of elegance and purity.

WhiteSharkFin.name: White Shark Fin
WhiteSharkFin.flavorText: The dorsal fin of the great white shark, known as the outlaw of the sea. Thick and tough in texture, it is regarded among gourmets as a rare delicacy.

WhiteSharkHide.name: White Shark Hide
WhiteSharkHide.flavorText: The dorsal hide of a great white shark, surprisingly smooth and soft despite its ferocious owner. Its surface still holds traces of seawater, giving it a faint, lingering dampness.

WhiteSharkTooth.name: White Shark Tooth
WhiteSharkTooth.flavorText: A razor-sharp tooth made for rending flesh, its surface still crusted with the flesh and fresh blood of a recently bitten prey.

WhiteThreadSpool.name: White Thread Spool
WhiteThreadSpool.flavorText: A bundle of white thread neatly wound around a wooden spool.

WindLocket.name: Wind Locket
WindLocket.flavorText: Silver pendant necklace inlaid with filigree surrounding a mystical blue stone.

WindlassCrossbow.name: Windlass Crossbow
WindlassCrossbow.flavorText: Crafted with added metal around it's wooden bend for a more stable shot, requiring a bit of effort to reload.

WizardHat.name: Wizard Hat
WizardHat.flavorText: “The taller the wizard hat the more superior the wizard.” - Wizard in the Sky.

WizardShoes.name: Wizard Shoes
WizardShoes.flavorText: Crafted using some the softest leathers to accommodate the delicate feet.

WizardStaff.name: Magic Staff
WizardStaff.flavorText: A staff carefully crafted with spiraling branches from a magical tree that encase an enchanted orb.

WolfClaw.name: Wolf Claw
WolfClaw.flavorText: The razor-sharp talon of a vanquished Dire Wolf.

WolfFang.name: Wolf Fang
WolfFang.flavorText: A gleaming fang torn from the jaws of a Dire Wolf.

WolfHunterLeggings.name: Wolf Hunter Leggings
WolfHunterLeggings.flavorText: Heavy Leather Leggings using the pelts acquired from powerful beasts.

WolfPelt.name: Wolf Pelt
WolfPelt.flavorText: A robust hide that is covered in thick coarse fur.

WoodenDice.name: Wooden Die
WoodenDice.flavorText: A crudely carved wooden die. Its surface has been worn smooth by countless hands.

WoodenFigurine.name: Wooden Figurine
WoodenFigurine.flavorText: A small wooden figurine roughly carved by hand. The sculptor's unskilled but earnest touch still lingers.

WoodenMask.name: Wooden Mask
WoodenMask.flavorText: A grotesquely warped mask, its surface crusted with patches of an unknown dried substance.

WoodenPlank.name: Wooden Plank
WoodenPlank.flavorText: A wooden plank cut into a neat rectangular shape.

WoodenStake.name: Wooden Stake
WoodenStake.flavorText: A wooden stake with a sharpened tip.

WoodsmanAxe.name: Woodsman Axe
WoodsmanAxe.flavorText: A common iron axe capable of chopping down most trees.

WoolenCap.name: Woolen Cap
WoolenCap.flavorText: A practical cap easily found by anyone. Knitted from wool, it is not thick but offers minimal warmth.

WorkshopRemnant.name: Remnants
WorkshopRemnant.flavorText: These are small pieces of leather and fabric left behind during the equipment dismantling process. They are used in crafting new equipment.

WorkshopScraps.name: Scraps
WorkshopScraps.flavorText: These are small metal fragments left behind during the equipment dismantling process. They are used in crafting new equipment.

WovenRattanBottle.name: Woven Rattan Bottle
WovenRattanBottle.flavorText: A small decorative bottle woven from rattan. The surface retains the natural texture of the plant.

YellowThreadSpool.name: Yellow Thread Spool
YellowThreadSpool.flavorText: A bundle of yellow thread neatly wound around a wooden spool.

Zweihander.name: Zweihander
Zweihander.flavorText: The sheer weight and length of this mighty double-edge blade can be felt pulling on you as you swing.
